En smartere måte å reise på — Komplett prosjekteksport for Codex

eller last ned hele prosjektet som ZIP

\n \n\n`;\n\nconst MAIN_TSX = `import { StrictMode } from \"react\";\nimport { createRoot } from \"react-dom/client\";\nimport { RouterProvider } from \"react-router\";\nimport { router } from \"./app/routes\";\nimport \"./styles/index.css\";\n\nconst rootEl = document.getElementById(\"root\");\nif (!rootEl) throw new Error(\"Root element #root not found in index.html\");\n\ncreateRoot(rootEl).render(\n \n \n \n);\n`;\n\nconst ROUTES_DIFF = `// I src/app/routes.tsx — kun to linjer endres:\n\n// Linje 1:\n- import { createBrowserRouter, Outlet, useNavigate } from \"react-router\";\n+ import { createHashRouter, Outlet, useNavigate } from \"react-router\";\n\n// Linje 105:\n- export const router = createBrowserRouter([\n+ export const router = createHashRouter([\n`;\n\nconst EXPORT_CHECKLIST = `# KJAPP — Eksport-sjekkliste\n\n## 1. Initiell oppsett\n- [ ] Klon repoet: git clone \n- [ ] pnpm install\n\n## 2. Vite-entrypoint\n- [ ] Legg index.html i prosjekt-rot\n- [ ] Legg src/main.tsx\n- [ ] Slett __figma__entrypoint__.ts\n- [ ] Verifiser: pnpm dev\n\n## 3. Bytt router\n- [ ] BrowserRouter -> HashRouter i src/app/routes.tsx\n\n## 4. Produksjons-bygg\n- [ ] pnpm build\n- [ ] pnpm exec vite preview\n\n## 5. PWA (Fase 3)\n- [ ] pnpm add -D vite-plugin-pwa\n- [ ] Konfigurer manifest + ikoner\n- [ ] Deploy: pnpm dlx vercel\n\n## 6. Capacitor (Fase 4)\n- [ ] pnpm add @capacitor/core @capacitor/cli @capacitor/android @capacitor/ios\n- [ ] pnpm add @capacitor/geolocation @capacitor/push-notifications @capacitor/preferences\n- [ ] pnpm exec cap init \"KJAPP\" \"no.kjapp.app\" --web-dir=dist\n- [ ] pnpm exec cap add android\n- [ ] pnpm exec cap add ios (krever Mac + Xcode)\n- [ ] localStorage -> Preferences.get/set i theme.ts + navigation.ts\n- [ ] pnpm build && pnpm exec cap sync && pnpm exec cap open android\n\n## 7. Pilot (Fase 5)\n- [ ] Sentry + PostHog\n- [ ] Google Play Internal Testing\n- [ ] TestFlight\n- [ ] 10-20 kunder + 5-10 sjafører i Oslo\n- [ ] 2-4 uker, 50+ ekte turer\n\nEstimat: 4-6 uker fra eksport til pilot live.\n`;\n\nconst QA_AUDIT_SUMMARY = `# Fase 0 QA-audit — sammendrag\n\nTotal: 47 skjermer\n\n| Status | Antall | Andel |\n|---|---|---|\n| ✅ Pilot-klar | 11 | 22% |\n| 🟡 UI ok, data mock | 29 | 60% |\n| ⚪ Krever manuell tap-test | 7 | 15% |\n| 🔴 Blocker | 0 | 0% |\n\nIngen 🔴 blockers — vi kan trygt starte Fase 1 + Fase 2 parallelt.\n\nManuell verifisering kreves for:\n- /voice (mic-tilgang i WebView?)\n- /ar-pickup (ekte AR eller mock?)\n- /connect (formål uklart)\n- /rekk-avgangen (fly-pickup-flyt komplett?)\n- /driver/access (gate-logikk)\n- /driver/navigate (deep link til ekstern navi)\n- /driver/onboarding (dokument-opplasting)\n\nFull audit-tabell ligger i plans/qa-audit.md.\n`;\n\ntype FileItem = {\n filename: string;\n destination: string;\n content: string;\n size: string;\n icon: typeof FileCode;\n description: string;\n};\n\nconst FILES: FileItem[] = [\n {\n filename: \"index.html\",\n destination: \"Prosjekt-rot\",\n content: INDEX_HTML,\n size: `${INDEX_HTML.length} B`,\n icon: FileCode,\n description: \"Vite-entrypoint. Erstatter __figma__entrypoint__.ts.\",\n },\n {\n filename: \"main.tsx\",\n destination: \"src/\",\n content: MAIN_TSX,\n size: `${MAIN_TSX.length} B`,\n icon: FileCode,\n description: \"React DOM bootstrap. Mounter RouterProvider på #root.\",\n },\n {\n filename: \"routes-hashrouter-diff.txt\",\n destination: \"Lim inn i src/app/routes.tsx\",\n content: ROUTES_DIFF,\n size: `${ROUTES_DIFF.length} B`,\n icon: FileText,\n description: \"BrowserRouter → HashRouter. Kreves for Capacitor WebView.\",\n },\n {\n filename: \"export-checklist.md\",\n destination: \"Dokumentasjon\",\n content: EXPORT_CHECKLIST,\n size: `${EXPORT_CHECKLIST.length} B`,\n icon: FileText,\n description: \"Steg-for-steg fra eksport til APK + TestFlight.\",\n },\n {\n filename: \"qa-audit-summary.md\",\n destination: \"Dokumentasjon\",\n content: QA_AUDIT_SUMMARY,\n size: `${QA_AUDIT_SUMMARY.length} B`,\n icon: FileText,\n description: \"Fase 0 status for alle 47 skjermer.\",\n },\n];\n\nfunction downloadFile(filename: string, content: string, mime = \"text/plain\") {\n const blob = new Blob([content], { type: `${mime};charset=utf-8` });\n const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n const a = document.createElement(\"a\");\n a.href = url;\n a.download = filename;\n document.body.appendChild(a);\n a.click();\n document.body.removeChild(a);\n setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 1000);\n}\n\nfunction downloadAll() {\n FILES.forEach((f, i) => {\n setTimeout(() => downloadFile(f.filename, f.content), i * 200);\n });\n}\n\nexport function ExportCenter({ go }: { go: (s: Screen) => void }) {\n return (\n go(\"profile\")}>\n
\n \n
\n \n \n
\n
\n
\n Fase 1 — Build-readiness\n
\n

\n Last ned filene du trenger for å gå fra Figma Make-prototype til deployerbar Vite-app. Følg{\" \"}\n export-checklist.md i rekkefølge.\n

\n
\n
\n\n \n \n LAST NED ALLE FILER\n \n \n\n
\n {FILES.map((f) => {\n const Icon = f.icon;\n return (\n \n
\n \n \n
\n
\n
\n \n {f.filename}\n \n \n {f.size}\n \n
\n \n → {f.destination}\n
\n

\n {f.description}\n

\n
\n \n\n downloadFile(f.filename, f.content)}\n className=\"mt-3 w-full py-2.5 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-2 active:scale-[0.98] transition\"\n style={{\n background: \"rgba(8,10,24,0.6)\",\n border: \"1px solid rgba(94,240,255,0.28)\",\n color: \"#5ef0ff\",\n fontFamily: \"JetBrains Mono, monospace\",\n fontSize: 11,\n letterSpacing: \"0.06em\",\n }}\n >\n \n LAST NED\n \n \n );\n })}\n \n\n \n
\n \n \n Status pr. fase\n \n
\n
\n {[\n { label: \"Fase 0 — QA-audit\", status: \"Ferdig\", color: \"#5ef0ff\" },\n { label: \"Fase 1 — Build-readiness\", status: \"Filer klar\", color: \"#5ef0ff\" },\n { label: \"Fase 2 — Supabase backend\", status: \"Klar til kjøring\", color: \"#ffb547\" },\n { label: \"Fase 3 — PWA-wrap\", status: \"Venter på Fase 1-eksport\", color: \"rgba(255,255,255,0.45)\" },\n { label: \"Fase 4 — Capacitor APK + iOS\", status: \"Krever Mac + Android Studio\", color: \"rgba(255,255,255,0.45)\" },\n { label: \"Fase 5 — Pilot-kjøring\", status: \"Etter Fase 4\", color: \"rgba(255,255,255,0.45)\" },\n ].map((row) => (\n
\n \n {row.label}\n \n \n {row.status}\n \n
\n ))}\n
\n \n \n \n );\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/components/screens/FleetDashboard.tsx", "content": "import { useState } from \"react\";\nimport { Car, Users, Banknote, FileWarning, UserPlus, ChevronRight, TrendingUp, Send } from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { SubScreen } from \"../SubScreen\";\nimport { GlassPanel } from \"../GlassPanel\";\nimport type { Screen } from \"../../App\";\n\nconst FLEET = {\n name: \"EKSEMPEL TAXI AS\",\n orgnr: \"999888777\",\n todayNok: 12480,\n weekNok: 84320,\n monthNok: 312500,\n};\n\nconst VEHICLES = [\n { id: \"1\", plate: \"AB12345\", model: \"Mercedes E-Class\", tier: \"Premium\", status: \"online\", driver: \"Mathilde H.\", insuranceDays: 92 },\n { id: \"2\", plate: \"CD67890\", model: \"Tesla Model Y\", tier: \"Eco\", status: \"online\", driver: \"Jonas R.\", insuranceDays: 18 },\n { id: \"3\", plate: \"EF11122\", model: \"Toyota Prius\", tier: \"Standard\", status: \"offline\", driver: \"Ledig\", insuranceDays: 240 },\n { id: \"4\", plate: \"GH33344\", model: \"VW Caravelle\", tier: \"XL\", status: \"online\", driver: \"Anders M.\", insuranceDays: 3 },\n];\n\nconst DRIVERS = [\n { id: \"1\", name: \"Mathilde Hansen\", rating: 4.92, trips: 1284, status: \"online\" },\n { id: \"2\", name: \"Jonas Rasch\", rating: 4.87, trips: 642, status: \"online\" },\n { id: \"3\", name: \"Anders Møller\", rating: 4.79, trips: 318, status: \"online\" },\n { id: \"4\", name: \"Kari Olsen\", rating: 4.95, trips: 89, status: \"pending\" },\n];\n\nconst VIOLET = \"#a06bff\";\nconst CYAN = \"#5ef0ff\";\nconst AMBER = \"#ffb547\";\n\ntype Tab = \"oversikt\" | \"biler\" | \"sjafor\" | \"okonomi\";\n\nexport function FleetDashboard({ go }: { go: (s: Screen) => void }) {\n const [tab, setTab] = useState(\"oversikt\");\n const [inviteOpen, setInviteOpen] = useState(false);\n const [invitePhone, setInvitePhone] = useState(\"\");\n\n const sendInvite = () => {\n setInviteOpen(false);\n setInvitePhone(\"\");\n };\n\n return (\n go(\"profile\")}>\n
\n \n
{FLEET.name}
\n
\n ORGNR · {FLEET.orgnr}\n
\n
\n \n \n \n
\n \n\n \n\n {tab === \"oversikt\" && (\n
\n \n
\n Status nå\n \n
\n } label=\"Biler online\" value={`${VEHICLES.filter((v) => v.status === \"online\").length} av ${VEHICLES.length}`} />\n } label=\"Sjåfører aktive\" value={`${DRIVERS.filter((d) => d.status === \"online\").length}`} />\n } label=\"Turer i dag\" value=\"48\" />\n \n \n
\n \n Dokumenter som utløper\n
\n {VEHICLES.filter((v) => v.insuranceDays < 30).map((v) => (\n
\n
\n
{v.plate} — Forsikring
\n
{v.model}
\n
\n
\n {v.insuranceDays}d\n
\n

\n )}\n\n {tab === \"biler\" && (\n

\n \n
\n
\n
\n {v.plate}\n \n {v.tier}\n \n
\n
{v.model} · {v.driver}
\n
\n \n \n ))}\n \n + Legg til bil/løyve\n \n
\n )}\n\n {tab === \"sjafor\" && (\n
\n setInviteOpen(true)}\n className=\"rounded-2xl p-3 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 active:scale-[0.98] transition\"\n style={{ background: \"linear-gradient(135deg, #5ef0ff, #a06bff)\", color: \"#05060f\", fontFamily: \"Space Grotesk, sans-serif\", fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 600, letterSpacing: \"0.06em\" }}\n >\n \n INVITER SJÅFØR\n \n {DRIVERS.map((d) => (\n \n
\n {d.name.charAt(0)}\n
\n
\n
{d.name}
\n
★ {d.rating} · {d.trips} turer
\n
\n {d.status === \"pending\" ? (\n \n Venter\n \n ) : (\n
\n )}\n \n ))}\n\n {inviteOpen && (\n \n
Send SMS-invitasjon
\n setInvitePhone(e.target.value)}\n placeholder=\"+47 9XX XX XXX\"\n className=\"w-full rounded-xl px-3 py-2.5 text-white outline-none\"\n style={{ fontSize: 13, background: \"rgba(8,10,24,0.5)\", border: \"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)\" }}\n />\n
\n \n = 8 ? \"linear-gradient(135deg, #5ef0ff, #a06bff)\" : \"rgba(255,255,255,0.08)\",\n color: invitePhone.length >= 8 ? \"#05060f\" : \"rgba(255,255,255,0.35)\",\n fontSize: 12,\n fontWeight: 600,\n }}\n >\n \n Send\n \n
\n

\n Sjåføren får en SMS med deep-link til onboarding, forhåndsfylt med flåte-ID for {FLEET.name}.\n

\n \n )}\n
\n )}\n\n {tab === \"okonomi\" && (\n
\n \n
Per bil i dag
\n {VEHICLES.map((v) => (\n
\n
\n
{v.plate}
\n
{v.driver}
\n
\n
\n {Math.round(2000 + Math.random() * 2500).toLocaleString(\"no\")} kr\n
\n
\n ))}\n \n \n
\n
\n
MVA-rapport · juni
\n
12% transport · Bokføringsloven §10
\n
\n \n
\n \n \n
\n )}\n
\n \n );\n}\n\nfunction Stat({ label, value, accent }: { label: string; value: string; accent: string }) {\n return (\n
\n
{value}
\n
{label}
\n
\n );\n}\n\nfunction Row({ icon, label, value }: { icon: React.ReactNode; label: string; value: string }) {\n return (\n
\n
{icon}
\n {label}\n {value}\n
\n );\n}\n\nfunction Tabs({ tab, onChange }: { tab: Tab; onChange: (t: Tab) => void }) {\n const items: { id: Tab; label: string }[] = [\n { id: \"oversikt\", label: \"Oversikt\" },\n { id: \"biler\", label: \"Biler\" },\n { id: \"sjafor\", label: \"Sjåfør\" },\n { id: \"okonomi\", label: \"Økonomi\" },\n ];\n return (\n
\n {items.map((it) => (\n onChange(it.id)}\n className=\"rounded-xl py-2 transition\"\n style={{\n background: tab === it.id ? \"linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(94,240,255,0.18), rgba(160,107,255,0.18))\" : \"transparent\",\n color: tab === it.id ? \"white\" : \"rgba(255,255,255,0.6)\",\n fontSize: 11,\n fontFamily: \"Space Grotesk, sans-serif\",\n }}\n >\n {it.label}\n \n ))}\n
\n );\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/components/screens/LoyvehaverRegister.tsx", "content": "import { useState } from \"react\";\nimport { Building2, Car, FileText, CreditCard, ShieldCheck, Plus, Trash2, Upload, Check } from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { SubScreen } from \"../SubScreen\";\nimport { GlassPanel } from \"../GlassPanel\";\nimport type { Screen } from \"../../App\";\n\ntype Loyve = { id: string; loyveNr: string; regNr: string; merke: string; modell: string; aar: string; tier: \"Standard\" | \"Premium\" | \"XL\" | \"Eco\" };\ntype Docs = { firmaattest?: string; forsikring?: string; kjoreseddel?: string; konto?: string };\n\nconst STEPS = [\"Bedrift\", \"Løyver\", \"Dokumenter\", \"Utbetaling\", \"Bekreft\"];\n\nconst VIOLET = \"#a06bff\";\nconst CYAN = \"#5ef0ff\";\n\nfunction StepHeader({ step }: { step: number }) {\n return (\n
\n {STEPS.map((s, i) => (\n
\n \n {i < step ? : i + 1}\n
\n \n {s}\n \n
\n ))}\n
\n );\n}\n\nfunction Field({ label, value, onChange, placeholder, type = \"text\", maxLength }: { label: string; value: string; onChange: (v: string) => void; placeholder?: string; type?: string; maxLength?: number }) {\n return (\n \n );\n}\n\nfunction DocUploadRow({ label, hint, value, onUpload }: { label: string; hint: string; value?: string; onUpload: () => void }) {\n return (\n \n \n {value ? : }\n \n
\n
{label}
\n
{value ?? hint}
\n
\n \n );\n}\n\nexport function LoyvehaverRegister({ go }: { go: (s: Screen) => void }) {\n const [step, setStep] = useState(0);\n\n const [orgnr, setOrgnr] = useState(\"\");\n const [orgnavn, setOrgnavn] = useState(\"\");\n const [adresse, setAdresse] = useState(\"\");\n const [kontaktNavn, setKontaktNavn] = useState(\"\");\n const [mobil, setMobil] = useState(\"\");\n const [epost, setEpost] = useState(\"\");\n\n const [loyver, setLoyver] = useState([\n { id: \"1\", loyveNr: \"\", regNr: \"\", merke: \"\", modell: \"\", aar: \"\", tier: \"Standard\" },\n ]);\n\n const [docs, setDocs] = useState({});\n\n const [konto, setKonto] = useState(\"\");\n const [kontohaver, setKontohaver] = useState(\"\");\n\n const [samtykke, setSamtykke] = useState(false);\n const [sent, setSent] = useState(false);\n\n const lookupOrg = () => {\n // Mock Brønnøysund-oppslag\n if (orgnr.length === 9) {\n setOrgnavn(\"EKSEMPEL TAXI AS\");\n setAdresse(\"Storgata 12, 0184 Oslo\");\n }\n };\n\n const addLoyve = () => setLoyver([...loyver, { id: String(Date.now()), loyveNr: \"\", regNr: \"\", merke: \"\", modell: \"\", aar: \"\", tier: \"Standard\" }]);\n const removeLoyve = (id: string) => setLoyver(loyver.filter((l) => l.id !== id));\n const updateLoyve = (id: string, patch: Partial) => setLoyver(loyver.map((l) => (l.id === id ? { ...l, ...patch } : l)));\n\n const lookupReg = (id: string, regNr: string) => {\n if (regNr.length >= 7) updateLoyve(id, { merke: \"Mercedes-Benz\", modell: \"E-Class\", aar: \"2023\" });\n };\n\n const canNext = () => {\n if (step === 0) return orgnr.length === 9 && orgnavn && kontaktNavn && mobil.length >= 8 && epost.includes(\"@\");\n if (step === 1) return loyver.every((l) => l.loyveNr && l.regNr);\n if (step === 2) return docs.firmaattest && docs.forsikring && docs.konto;\n if (step === 3) return konto.length === 11 && kontohaver.length > 1;\n if (step === 4) return samtykke;\n return false;\n };\n\n const submit = () => {\n setSent(true);\n setTimeout(() => go(\"signin\"), 2400);\n };\n\n if (sent) {\n return (\n go(\"signin\")}>\n
\n \n \n
\n
Søknad mottatt
\n

\n Vi ringer eller sender SMS innen 48 timer. Du kan logge inn med samme mobilnummer når søknaden er godkjent.\n

\n \n \n );\n }\n\n return (\n (step === 0 ? go(\"signin\") : setStep(step - 1))}>\n
\n \n\n {step === 0 && (\n \n
\n \n Bedrift\n
\n
\n
\n \n
\n \n SLÅ OPP\n \n
\n \n \n
\n \n \n \n \n )}\n\n {step === 1 && (\n
\n {loyver.map((l, i) => (\n \n
\n
\n \n Løyve #{i + 1}\n
\n {loyver.length > 1 && (\n \n )}\n
\n updateLoyve(l.id, { loyveNr: v })} placeholder=\"OSL-0000\" />\n { updateLoyve(l.id, { regNr: v.toUpperCase() }); lookupReg(l.id, v); }} placeholder=\"AB12345\" />\n
\n updateLoyve(l.id, { merke: v })} />\n updateLoyve(l.id, { modell: v })} />\n
\n
\n updateLoyve(l.id, { aar: v })} maxLength={4} />\n \n
\n \n ))}\n \n \n Legg til løyve\n \n
\n )}\n\n {step === 2 && (\n
\n
\n \n Dokumenter\n
\n

\n PDF eller foto. Lagres kryptert i kjapp-private bucket, kun synlig for deg + admin.\n

\n setDocs({ ...docs, firmaattest: \"firmaattest.pdf · 124 KB\" })}\n />\n setDocs({ ...docs, forsikring: \"forsikring-2026.pdf · 312 KB\" })}\n />\n setDocs({ ...docs, kjoreseddel: \"kjoreseddel.jpg · 1.2 MB\" })}\n />\n setDocs({ ...docs, konto: \"konto-bekreftelse.pdf · 88 KB\" })}\n />\n
\n )}\n\n {step === 3 && (\n \n
\n \n Utbetaling\n
\n

\n Daglig utbetaling kl. 03:00 til denne kontoen. MVA spesifiseres i månedsrapport.\n

\n setKonto(v.replace(/\\D/g, \"\"))} maxLength={11} placeholder=\"00000000000\" />\n \n \n )}\n\n {step === 4 && (\n \n
\n \n Samtykke og bekreftelse\n
\n
\n
\n {orgnavn || \"Bedrift\"} · {orgnr}
\n {loyver.length} løyve(r) · {Object.keys(docs).length} dokument(er)
\n Utbetaling til: {konto || \"(ikke utfylt)\"}\n
\n
\n \n \n )}\n\n
\n {step > 0 && (\n setStep(step - 1)}\n className=\"flex-1 glass-panel rounded-2xl py-3 text-white active:scale-[0.98] transition\"\n style={{ fontSize: 13 }}\n >\n Tilbake\n \n )}\n {step < STEPS.length - 1 ? (\n canNext() && setStep(step + 1)}\n disabled={!canNext()}\n className=\"flex-1 rounded-2xl py-3 active:scale-[0.98] transition\"\n style={{\n background: canNext() ? \"linear-gradient(135deg, #5ef0ff, #a06bff)\" : \"rgba(255,255,255,0.08)\",\n color: canNext() ? \"#05060f\" : \"rgba(255,255,255,0.35)\",\n fontFamily: \"Space Grotesk, sans-serif\",\n fontSize: 13,\n letterSpacing: \"0.06em\",\n fontWeight: 600,\n boxShadow: canNext() ? \"0 8px 28px -8px rgba(160,107,255,0.55)\" : \"none\",\n }}\n >\n Neste →\n \n ) : (\n canNext() && submit()}\n disabled={!canNext()}\n className=\"flex-1 rounded-2xl py-3 active:scale-[0.98] transition\"\n style={{\n background: canNext() ? \"linear-gradient(135deg, #5ef0ff, #a06bff)\" : \"rgba(255,255,255,0.08)\",\n color: canNext() ? \"#05060f\" : \"rgba(255,255,255,0.35)\",\n fontFamily: \"Space Grotesk, sans-serif\",\n fontSize: 13,\n letterSpacing: \"0.06em\",\n fontWeight: 600,\n }}\n >\n Send til godkjenning\n \n )}\n
\n
\n \n );\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/components/screens/SuperAdminInbox.tsx", "content": "import { useState } from \"react\";\nimport { Check, X, FileText, Upload, ChevronRight, Building2, AlertCircle } from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { SubScreen } from \"../SubScreen\";\nimport { GlassPanel } from \"../GlassPanel\";\nimport type { Screen } from \"../../App\";\n\ntype AppStatus = \"pending\" | \"approved\" | \"rejected\";\ntype Application = {\n id: string;\n orgnr: string;\n orgnavn: string;\n kontakt: string;\n mobil: string;\n loyver: number;\n docs: number;\n submittedAt: string;\n status: AppStatus;\n};\n\nconst INITIAL: Application[] = [\n { id: \"a1\", orgnr: \"923456789\", orgnavn: \"OSLO PREMIUM TAXI AS\", kontakt: \"Lars Eriksen\", mobil: \"+47 901 23 456\", loyver: 3, docs: 4, submittedAt: \"2 t siden\", status: \"pending\" },\n { id: \"a2\", orgnr: \"918273645\", orgnavn: \"FJORD MOBILITY AS\", kontakt: \"Ingrid Solberg\", mobil: \"+47 934 56 789\", loyver: 1, docs: 4, submittedAt: \"5 t siden\", status: \"pending\" },\n { id: \"a3\", orgnr: \"987654321\", orgnavn: \"NORD TRANSPORT AS\", kontakt: \"Petter Haugen\", mobil: \"+47 902 11 223\", loyver: 5, docs: 3, submittedAt: \"i går\", status: \"pending\" },\n { id: \"a4\", orgnr: \"912121212\", orgnavn: \"AURORA RIDE AS\", kontakt: \"Maja Knudsen\", mobil: \"+47 988 77 665\", loyver: 2, docs: 4, submittedAt: \"i går\", status: \"pending\" },\n];\n\nconst VIOLET = \"#a06bff\";\nconst CYAN = \"#5ef0ff\";\nconst AMBER = \"#ffb547\";\n\nexport function SuperAdminInbox({ go }: { go: (s: Screen) => void }) {\n const [apps, setApps] = useState(INITIAL);\n const [selected, setSelected] = useState(null);\n const [csvOpen, setCsvOpen] = useState(false);\n\n const pending = apps.filter((a) => a.status === \"pending\");\n\n const approve = (id: string) => {\n setApps(apps.map((a) => (a.id === id ? { ...a, status: \"approved\" } : a)));\n setSelected(null);\n };\n const reject = (id: string) => {\n setApps(apps.map((a) => (a.id === id ? { ...a, status: \"rejected\" } : a)));\n setSelected(null);\n };\n\n if (selected) {\n return (\n setSelected(null)}>\n
\n \n
\n
\n \n
\n
\n
{selected.orgnavn}
\n
\n ORGNR · {selected.orgnr}\n
\n
\n {selected.kontakt} · {selected.mobil}\n
\n
\n
\n
\n
\n
{selected.loyver}
\n
Løyver
\n
\n
\n
{selected.docs}/4
\n
Dokumenter
\n
\n
\n \n\n \n
Dokumenter
\n {[\"Firmaattest\", \"Forsikringsbevis\", \"Kjøreseddel-grunnlag\", \"Kontobekreftelse\"].map((d, i) => (\n \n ))}\n \n\n
\n reject(selected.id)}\n className=\"flex-1 rounded-2xl py-3 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 active:scale-[0.98] transition\"\n style={{ background: \"rgba(255,107,107,0.12)\", border: \"1px solid rgba(255,107,107,0.35)\", color: \"#ff6b6b\", fontFamily: \"Space Grotesk, sans-serif\", fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 600 }}\n >\n \n Avslå\n \n approve(selected.id)}\n className=\"flex-1 rounded-2xl py-3 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 active:scale-[0.98] transition\"\n style={{ background: \"linear-gradient(135deg, #5ef0ff, #a06bff)\", color: \"#05060f\", fontFamily: \"Space Grotesk, sans-serif\", fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 600, letterSpacing: \"0.06em\", boxShadow: \"0 8px 28px -8px rgba(94,240,255,0.55)\" }}\n >\n \n Godkjenn\n \n
\n
\n \n );\n }\n\n return (\n go(\"profile\")}>\n
\n \n
\n \n
\n
\n
{pending.length} venter på godkjenning
\n
30 på venteliste fra CSV-import
\n
\n \n\n
\n setCsvOpen(!csvOpen)}\n className=\"flex-1 glass-panel rounded-2xl py-2.5 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 active:scale-[0.98] transition\"\n style={{ color: VIOLET, fontFamily: \"JetBrains Mono, monospace\", fontSize: 10.5, letterSpacing: \"0.16em\" }}\n >\n \n CSV-IMPORT\n \n \n BULK-MODUS\n \n
\n\n {csvOpen && (\n \n
\n Last opp .csv med kolonner: orgnr, kontakt, mobil, epost\n
\n \n
\n Systemet sender SMS-invitasjon til hver mottaker med ferdig-utfylt registreringsskjema.\n
\n \n )}\n\n
\n {pending.map((a) => (\n setSelected(a)}\n className=\"glass-panel rounded-2xl p-3 flex items-center gap-3 text-left active:scale-[0.99] transition\"\n >\n
\n \n
\n
\n
\n {a.orgnavn}\n
\n
\n {a.kontakt} · {a.loyver} løyver · {a.submittedAt}\n
\n
\n \n {a.docs}/4\n \n \n \n ))}\n
\n\n {apps.filter((a) => a.status !== \"pending\").length > 0 && (\n
\n
Behandlet i dag
\n
\n {apps.filter((a) => a.status !== \"pending\").map((a) => (\n
\n
\n {a.status === \"approved\" ? : }\n
\n
\n
{a.orgnavn}
\n
{a.status === \"approved\" ? \"Godkjent\" : \"Avslått\"}
\n
\n
\n ))}\n
\n
\n )}\n
\n \n );\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/components/screens/DataExport.tsx", "content": "import { useState } from \"react\";\nimport { Download, Check, AlertTriangle } from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { LegalScreen, H, P } from \"../legal/LegalScreen\";\nimport { mGet } from \"../../lib/makeServer\";\nimport type { Screen } from \"../../App\";\n\nexport function DataExport({ go }: { go: (s: Screen) => void }) {\n const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);\n const [done, setDone] = useState(false);\n const [error, setError] = useState(null);\n\n const download = async () => {\n setBusy(true);\n setError(null);\n try {\n const data = await mGet(\"/gdpr/export\");\n const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(data, null, 2)], {\n type: \"application/json\",\n });\n const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n const a = document.createElement(\"a\");\n a.href = url;\n a.download = `kjapp-mine-data-${new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10)}.json`;\n document.body.appendChild(a);\n a.click();\n a.remove();\n URL.revokeObjectURL(url);\n setDone(true);\n } catch (e: any) {\n setError(e?.message || \"Kunne ikke laste ned data. Prøv igjen senere.\");\n } finally {\n setBusy(false);\n }\n };\n\n return (\n go(\"settings\")}\n >\n

\n Du har rett til å få en kopi av alle personopplysninger vi har lagret om\n deg. Filen leveres som JSON og inkluderer profil, tur-historikk,\n betalingsmetoder (anonymisert), meldinger og samtykke-logg.\n

\n\n Hva inkluderes\n

\n Profil, lagrede steder, tur-historikk (hentepunkt, leveringspunkt,\n pris, MVA), meldinger, samtykker, og payment-method-referanser. Sensitive\n kortdata lagres aldri hos oss.\n

\n\n \n {done ? : }\n {busy ? \"Henter data…\" : done ? \"Nedlasting startet\" : \"Last ned mine data\"}\n \n\n {error && (\n \n \n {error}\n
\n )}\n \n );\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/components/screens/PrivacyPolicy.tsx", "content": "import { LegalScreen, H, P, L } from \"../legal/LegalScreen\";\nimport type { Screen } from \"../../App\";\n\nexport function PrivacyPolicy({ go }: { go: (s: Screen) => void }) {\n return (\n go(\"settings\")}\n >\n

\n KJAPP er en taxi-tjeneste levert av NexoraHub AS{\" \"}\n (orgnr 914 827 442). Vi tar ditt personvern på alvor og behandler dine\n personopplysninger i henhold til personopplysningsloven og GDPR.\n

\n\n 1. Hvem er behandlingsansvarlig\n

\n NexoraHub AS, med kontakt-epost{\" \"}\n personvern@kjapp.no, er behandlingsansvarlig for\n personopplysninger som behandles via KJAPP-appen.\n

\n\n 2. Hvilke data vi behandler\n \n
  • \n Kontoinformasjon: mobilnummer, navn, e-post, valgt\n språk\n
    • \n
  • \n Lokasjon: GPS-posisjon ved aktiv tur eller\n adresse-søk\n
    • \n
  • \n Tur-historikk: hentepunkt, leveringspunkt, tid, pris,\n MVA, sjåfør-ID\n
    • \n
  • \n Betalingsdata: kortinformasjon lagres hos Stripe/Vipps,\n vi mottar kun anonymisert token og siste 4 siffer\n
    • \n
  • \n Kommunikasjon: meldinger mellom kunde og sjåfør\n under aktiv tur\n
    • \n
  • \n Telemetri: krasj-rapporter, ytelsesdata for å bedre\n appen\n
    • \n     \n\n 3. Hvorfor vi behandler dataene\n \n
  • For å levere taxi-tjenesten (avtaleforpliktelse)
    • \n
  • For å oppfylle bokførings- og skatteforpliktelser (Bokføringsloven §10)
    • \n
  • For å forebygge svindel og misbruk (berettiget interesse)
    • \n
  • For å forbedre tjenesten (samtykke)
    • \n     \n\n 4. Lagringstid\n \n
  • Aktiv kontoinformasjon: så lenge du har konto
    • \n
  • Tur-historikk: 5 år anonymisert etter sletting (regnskapsplikt)
    • \n
  • GPS-spor fra sjåfører: 30 dager
    • \n
  • Meldinger: 90 dager
    • \n
  • Krasj-rapporter: 90 dager
    • \n     \n\n 5. Hvem vi deler data med (databehandlere)\n \n
  • \n Supabase (EU, Stockholm) — database og autentisering\n
    • \n
  • \n Stripe (Irland) — kortbetaling\n
    • \n
  • \n Vipps MobilePay AS (Norge) — mobilbetaling\n
    • \n
  • \n Google Maps Platform (Irland) — adresse-søk og ruting\n
    • \n
  • \n OpenAI (USA) — Aurora AI-assistent (kun det du\n eksplisitt skriver til assistenten)\n
    • \n
  • \n LinkMobility (Norge) — SMS-engangskoder\n
    • \n     \n

    \n Vi har databehandleravtaler med alle leverandører. Overføring til USA\n (OpenAI) skjer under EUs Data Privacy Framework.\n

    \n\n 6. Dine rettigheter\n \n
  • \n Innsyn — Last ned alle dine data fra Innstillinger →\n Personvern → \"Last ned mine data\"\n
    • \n
  • \n Sletting — Innstillinger → \"Slett konto\". Vi\n anonymiserer turhistorikk og hard-sletter betalingsdata umiddelbart.\n 30-dagers angrefrist før permanent sletting.\n
    • \n
  • \n Korrigering — Endre navn/e-post i profil\n
    • \n
  • \n Klage — Du kan klage til{\" \"}\n Datatilsynet (datatilsynet.no)\n
    • \n
  • \n Trekke samtykke — Når som helst i Innstillinger\n
    • \n     \n\n 7. Sikkerhet\n

    \n All trafikk krypteres med TLS 1.3. Data hos Supabase lagres med\n AES-256-kryptering. Row Level Security gjør at sjåfører kun ser turer\n de er tildelt, og kunder kun ser egne data. Tjenestenøkler er aldri\n eksponert i appen.\n

    \n\n 8. Endringer\n

    \n Vi varsler om endringer i denne erklæringen i appen og ber om nytt\n samtykke ved vesentlige endringer.\n

    \n\n 9. Kontakt\n

    \n Spørsmål? Send e-post til personvern@kjapp.no.\n

    \n \n );\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/components/screens/TermsOfService.tsx", "content": "import { LegalScreen, H, P, L } from \"../legal/LegalScreen\";\nimport type { Screen } from \"../../App\";\n\nexport function TermsOfService({ go }: { go: (s: Screen) => void }) {\n return (\n go(\"settings\")}\n >\n

    \n Disse vilkårene gjelder bruk av KJAPP-appen levert av NexoraHub AS\n (orgnr 914 827 442).\n

    \n\n 1. Tjenesten\n

    \n KJAPP formidler taxi-turer mellom kunder og uavhengige løyvehavere.\n NexoraHub er ikke selv transportør, men plattform for bestilling og\n betaling.\n

    \n\n 2. Brukerkonto\n \n
  • Du må være minst 16 år for å opprette konto
    • \n
  • Du er ansvarlig for kontoinformasjon og sikker innlogging
    • \n
  • Falsk informasjon kan føre til stenging av konto
    • \n     \n\n 3. Bestilling og betaling\n \n
  • \n Pris vises før bestilling og inkluderer 12% MVA (persontransport)\n
    • \n
  • \n Endelig pris kan justeres ved bom, ventetid eller endret rute\n
    • \n
  • Betaling trekkes etter fullført tur via Vipps eller kort
    • \n
  • Kvittering sendes til registrert e-post og er tilgjengelig i appen
    • \n     \n\n 4. Avbestilling\n \n
  • Gratis å avbestille før sjåfør har akseptert
    • \n
  • \n Etter aksept: avbestillingsgebyr 50 kr hvis sjåfør er mer enn 2\n minutter unna, ellers 75 kr\n
    • \n
  • \"No-show\" (kunden møter ikke opp): 100 kr
    • \n     \n\n 5. Sjåførens og kundens plikter\n \n
  • Vis respekt og følg norsk lov
    • \n
  • Ikke alkohol- eller rusmisbruk i bilen
    • \n
  • Skader på bil eller eiendom belastes kunden
    • \n
  • \n Sjåfør kan avbryte tur ved truende oppførsel — slike turer faktureres\n ikke\n
    • \n     \n\n 6. Tildeling av sjåfør\n

    \n KJAPP matcher kunder med nærmeste tilgjengelige sjåfør med riktig\n bil-type. Du har ikke garantert ankomst innen estimert tid; ETA er\n veiledende.\n

    \n\n 7. Klager\n

    \n Klager sendes via Innstillinger → Support, eller til{\" \"}\n support@kjapp.no. Klage på pris må fremsettes innen 14\n dager.\n

    \n\n 8. Ansvarsbegrensning\n

    \n NexoraHub er ikke ansvarlig for skader, forsinkelser eller tap som\n følge av sjåførens utførelse av turen. Slikt ansvar ligger hos\n løyvehaver / sjåfør i henhold til norsk yrkestransportlov og\n forsikring.\n

    \n\n 9. Endringer\n

    \n Vi kan endre vilkårene. Endringer varsles i appen og krever nytt\n samtykke ved vesentlige endringer.\n

    \n\n 10. Lov og verneting\n

    \n Norsk lov gjelder. Tvister behandles av Oslo tingrett, med mindre\n ufravikelig norsk forbrukerlovgivning bestemmer annet.\n

    \n\n 11. Kontakt\n

    \n NexoraHub AS · post@kjapp.no\n

    \n \n );\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/components/signin/DriverLoginButton.tsx", "content": "import { motion } from \"motion/react\";\n\nexport function DriverLoginButton({ onClick }: { onClick: () => void }) {\n return (\n \n \n \n SJÅFØR? LOGG INN\n \n \n );\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/components/signin/DynamicBackground.tsx", "content": "import { motion } from \"motion/react\";\nimport { HolographicBackground } from \"../HolographicBackground\";\n\n/**\n * Forfinet bakgrunn for SignIn-skjermen — bygger på den eksisterende\n * holografiske bakgrunnen, men demper støy og legger til en subtil\n * cyan/violet premium-gradient på toppen.\n */\nexport function DynamicBackground() {\n return (\n
    \n {/* Behold den eksisterende cosmic basen, men dempet */}\n \n\n {/* Premium light-bleed øverst */}\n \n\n {/* Subtil violet undertone — ikke for tung mot bunnen */}\n \n\n {/* Dempet \"stjernestøy\"-mask — fjern hard prikkete tekstur */}\n \n
    \n );\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/components/signin/ExploreLink.tsx", "content": "import { motion } from \"motion/react\";\nimport { ArrowRight } from \"lucide-react\";\n\nexport function ExploreLink({ onClick }: { onClick: () => void }) {\n return (\n \n Se hvordan KJAPP fungerer\n \n \n );\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/components/signin/GreetingHeader.tsx", "content": "import { motion } from \"motion/react\";\n\nfunction activeGreeting() {\n const h = new Date().getHours();\n if (h < 5) return \"God natt, Oslo\";\n if (h < 10) return \"God morgen, Oslo\";\n if (h < 17) return \"God dag, Oslo\";\n if (h < 22) return \"God kveld, Oslo\";\n return \"Reis smartere i kveld\";\n}\n\nexport function GreetingHeader() {\n return (\n \n {activeGreeting()}\n \n );\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/components/signin/KJAPPLogo.tsx", "content": "import { motion } from \"motion/react\";\n\n/**\n * Premium KJAPP-logo — ren, lesbar wordmark med subtilt holografisk fyll.\n * Erstatter den lekne kj-app-grafikken med en seriøs Nordic-tech-treatment.\n */\nexport function KJAPPLogo({ size = 34 }: { size?: number }) {\n return (\n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n KJAPP\n \n \n \n En smartere måte å reise på\n

    \n \n );\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/components/signin/LegalFooter.tsx", "content": "import { motion } from \"motion/react\";\n\nexport function LegalFooter() {\n return (\n \n Ved å fortsette godtar du{\" \"}\n \n vilkår\n {\" \"}\n og{\" \"}\n \n personvern\n \n \n );\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/components/signin/SecondaryLoginButton.tsx", "content": "import { motion } from \"motion/react\";\nimport { Apple } from \"lucide-react\";\nimport type { ReactNode } from \"react\";\n\ntype Variant = \"bankid\" | \"apple\" | \"google\";\n\nexport function SecondaryLoginButton({\n variant,\n label,\n onClick,\n}: {\n variant: Variant;\n label: string;\n onClick: () => void;\n}) {\n return (\n \n \n \n {label}\n \n \n );\n}\n\nfunction Icon({ variant }: { variant: Variant }): ReactNode {\n if (variant === \"apple\") {\n return ;\n }\n if (variant === \"google\") {\n return (\n \n );\n }\n // BankID — offisiell-aktig wordmark-pill\n return (\n \n BankID\n \n );\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/components/signin/VippsLoginCard.tsx", "content": "import { motion } from \"motion/react\";\nimport { ArrowRight } from \"lucide-react\";\n\nexport function VippsLoginCard({ onClick }: { onClick: () => void }) {\n return (\n \n {/* Subtil holografisk glow — dempet ift. forrige versjon */}\n \n \n
    \n
    \n \n Fortsett med Vipps\n
    \n \n Rask og trygg innlogging\n
    \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n );\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/components/signin/OtpModal.tsx", "content": "import { useState } from \"react\";\nimport { motion, AnimatePresence } from \"motion/react\";\nimport { sendOtp, verifyOtp, normalizeNorwegianPhone } from \"../../lib/auth\";\nimport { isSupabaseConfigured } from \"../../data/supabase/client\";\n\ntype Step = \"phone\" | \"code\";\n\nexport function OtpModal({\n open,\n onClose,\n onSuccess,\n}: {\n open: boolean;\n onClose: () => void;\n onSuccess: () => void;\n}) {\n const [step, setStep] = useState(\"phone\");\n const [phone, setPhone] = useState(\"\");\n const [code, setCode] = useState(\"\");\n const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);\n const [error, setError] = useState(null);\n\n const reset = () => {\n setStep(\"phone\");\n setPhone(\"\");\n setCode(\"\");\n setError(null);\n setBusy(false);\n };\n\n const handleSend = async () => {\n setError(null);\n const normalized = normalizeNorwegianPhone(phone);\n if (!normalized) {\n setError(\"Ugyldig norsk mobilnummer (8 siffer)\");\n return;\n }\n if (!isSupabaseConfigured) {\n setError(\"Supabase ikke konfigurert i denne forhåndsvisningen\");\n return;\n }\n setBusy(true);\n const { error: err } = await sendOtp(normalized);\n setBusy(false);\n if (err) {\n setError(`Kunne ikke sende kode: ${err}`);\n return;\n }\n setStep(\"code\");\n };\n\n const handleVerify = async () => {\n setError(null);\n if (code.length < 4) {\n setError(\"Skriv inn koden fra SMS\");\n return;\n }\n setBusy(true);\n const { error: err } = await verifyOtp(phone, code);\n setBusy(false);\n if (err) {\n setError(`Feil kode: ${err}`);\n return;\n }\n reset();\n onSuccess();\n };\n\n return (\n \n {open && (\n {\n reset();\n onClose();\n }}\n >\n e.stopPropagation()}\n className=\"w-full max-w-md mx-auto flex flex-col\"\n style={{\n background: \"linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(18,22,42,0.92), rgba(8,10,24,0.96))\",\n border: \"1px solid rgba(94,240,255,0.18)\",\n borderRadius: \"24px 24px 0 0\",\n padding: \"24px 22px max(env(safe-area-inset-bottom), 24px) 22px\",\n gap: 16,\n boxShadow: \"0 -24px 48px rgba(94,240,255,0.08)\",\n }}\n >\n
    \n \n {step === \"phone\" ? \"Logg inn med SMS\" : \"Bekreft kode\"}\n
    \n {\n reset();\n onClose();\n }}\n className=\"font-mono uppercase active:scale-95 transition\"\n style={{\n fontSize: 10,\n letterSpacing: \"0.28em\",\n color: \"rgba(255,255,255,0.5)\",\n }}\n >\n Lukk\n \n \n\n {step === \"phone\" ? (\n <>\n \n Mobilnummer\n \n \n \n +47\n \n setPhone(e.target.value)}\n autoFocus\n style={{\n flex: 1,\n background: \"transparent\",\n border: \"none\",\n outline: \"none\",\n color: \"white\",\n fontSize: 17,\n fontVariantNumeric: \"tabular-nums\",\n letterSpacing: \"0.04em\",\n }}\n />\n \n {error && (\n
    {error}
    \n )}\n \n {busy ? \"Sender…\" : \"Send kode\"}\n \n \n Vi sender en engangskode på SMS\n \n \n ) : (\n <>\n \n Engangskode sendt til +47 {phone}\n \n setCode(e.target.value.replace(/\\D/g, \"\").slice(0, 6))}\n autoFocus\n style={{\n background: \"rgba(255,255,255,0.04)\",\n border: \"1px solid rgba(94,240,255,0.25)\",\n borderRadius: 14,\n padding: \"14px 18px\",\n color: \"white\",\n fontSize: 22,\n letterSpacing: \"0.4em\",\n textAlign: \"center\",\n fontVariantNumeric: \"tabular-nums\",\n outline: \"none\",\n }}\n />\n {error && (\n
    {error}
    \n )}\n \n {busy ? \"Bekrefter…\" : \"Bekreft\"}\n \n {\n setStep(\"phone\");\n setCode(\"\");\n setError(null);\n }}\n className=\"font-mono uppercase active:scale-95 transition\"\n style={{\n background: \"transparent\",\n border: \"none\",\n color: \"rgba(255,255,255,0.55)\",\n fontSize: 10,\n letterSpacing: \"0.28em\",\n padding: 6,\n }}\n >\n ← Endre nummer\n \n \n )}\n \n \n )}\n     \n );\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/components/brand/Wordmark.tsx", "content": "import { motion } from \"motion/react\";\n\ntype Size = \"hero\" | \"md\" | \"sm\";\ntype Variant = \"display\" | \"inline\" | \"mono\";\n\nconst SIZE_TOKENS: Record = {\n hero: { word: 92, tag: 9.5, gap: 14, tracking: \"0.34em\" },\n md: { word: 56, tag: 8.5, gap: 8, tracking: \"0.32em\" },\n sm: { word: 32, tag: 7, gap: 4, tracking: \"0.28em\" },\n};\n\n/**\n * KJAPP brand wordmark — editorial lowercase \"kjapp\" i Instrument Serif med\n * subtil aurora-skimring som sveiper over hver 8. sekund. Én sannhetskilde\n * på tvers av alle skjermer.\n */\nexport function Wordmark({\n size = \"md\",\n variant = \"display\",\n showTagline = true,\n tagline = \"en smartere måte å reise på\",\n animateShimmer = true,\n}: {\n size?: Size;\n variant?: Variant;\n showTagline?: boolean;\n tagline?: string;\n animateShimmer?: boolean;\n}) {\n const t = SIZE_TOKENS[size];\n\n if (variant === \"mono\") {\n return (\n
    \n \n KJAPP\n \n {showTagline && (\n \n {tagline}\n \n )}\n
    \n );\n }\n\n return (\n
    \n
    \n \n kjapp\n \n {animateShimmer && (\n \n kjapp\n \n )}\n
    \n {showTagline && (\n \n {tagline}\n \n )}\n
    \n );\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/components/brand/AuroraParticleField.tsx", "content": "import { useEffect, useRef } from \"react\";\n\ntype Particle = {\n x: number;\n y: number;\n vx: number;\n vy: number;\n r: number;\n hue: number;\n life: number;\n max: number;\n};\n\nconst HUES = [186, 268, 320]; // cyan, violet, magenta\n\nexport function AuroraParticleField({\n density = 60,\n emitFrom = \"center\",\n}: {\n density?: number;\n emitFrom?: \"center\" | \"top\" | \"scatter\";\n}) {\n const ref = useRef(null);\n\n useEffect(() => {\n const c = ref.current;\n if (!c) return;\n const ctx = c.getContext(\"2d\");\n if (!ctx) return;\n\n const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;\n const resize = () => {\n const { clientWidth: w, clientHeight: h } = c;\n c.width = w * dpr;\n c.height = h * dpr;\n ctx.scale(dpr, dpr);\n };\n resize();\n\n const particles: Particle[] = [];\n const spawn = () => {\n const w = c.clientWidth;\n const h = c.clientHeight;\n let x = w / 2;\n let y = h / 2;\n if (emitFrom === \"top\") {\n x = Math.random() * w;\n y = h * 0.25;\n } else if (emitFrom === \"scatter\") {\n x = Math.random() * w;\n y = Math.random() * h;\n }\n const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;\n const speed = 0.3 + Math.random() * 1.2;\n particles.push({\n x,\n y,\n vx: Math.cos(angle) * speed,\n vy: Math.sin(angle) * speed - 0.2,\n r: 0.6 + Math.random() * 1.6,\n hue: HUES[Math.floor(Math.random() * HUES.length)],\n life: 0,\n max: 80 + Math.random() * 60,\n });\n };\n\n for (let i = 0; i < density; i++) spawn();\n\n let raf = 0;\n const tick = () => {\n const w = c.clientWidth;\n const h = c.clientHeight;\n ctx.clearRect(0, 0, w, h);\n ctx.globalCompositeOperation = \"lighter\";\n for (let i = particles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n const p = particles[i];\n p.x += p.vx;\n p.y += p.vy;\n p.life++;\n const a = Math.max(0, 1 - p.life / p.max) * 0.7;\n const grd = ctx.createRadialGradient(p.x, p.y, 0, p.x, p.y, p.r * 4);\n grd.addColorStop(0, `hsla(${p.hue}, 100%, 70%, ${a})`);\n grd.addColorStop(1, `hsla(${p.hue}, 100%, 70%, 0)`);\n ctx.fillStyle = grd;\n ctx.beginPath();\n ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, p.r * 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);\n ctx.fill();\n if (p.life >= p.max) {\n particles.splice(i, 1);\n if (particles.length < density) spawn();\n }\n }\n raf = requestAnimationFrame(tick);\n };\n raf = requestAnimationFrame(tick);\n\n window.addEventListener(\"resize\", resize);\n return () => {\n cancelAnimationFrame(raf);\n window.removeEventListener(\"resize\", resize);\n };\n }, [density, emitFrom]);\n\n return (\n \n );\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/components/booking/PlacesSheet.tsx", "content": "import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { motion, AnimatePresence } from \"motion/react\";\nimport { MapPin, Search, X, Clock } from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { mGet, mPost } from \"../../lib/makeServer\";\n\nexport type PlaceSelection = {\n place_id: string;\n address: string;\n name?: string;\n lat: number;\n lng: number;\n};\n\ntype Prediction = {\n place_id: string;\n description: string;\n main_text?: string;\n secondary_text?: string;\n};\n\ntype Recent = {\n place_id: string;\n label?: string;\n address: string;\n lat: number;\n lng: number;\n};\n\nexport function PlacesSheet({\n open,\n title,\n initialValue,\n onClose,\n onSelect,\n}: {\n open: boolean;\n title: string;\n initialValue?: string;\n onClose: () => void;\n onSelect: (place: PlaceSelection) => void;\n}) {\n const [q, setQ] = useState(initialValue ?? \"\");\n const [predictions, setPredictions] = useState([]);\n const [recent, setRecent] = useState([]);\n const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);\n const [error, setError] = useState(null);\n const debRef = useRef | null>(null);\n\n useEffect(() => {\n if (!open) return;\n setQ(initialValue ?? \"\");\n setError(null);\n mGet<{ recent: Recent[] }>(\"/places/recent\")\n .then((r) => setRecent(r.recent ?? []))\n .catch(() => {});\n }, [open, initialValue]);\n\n useEffect(() => {\n if (!open) return;\n if (debRef.current) clearTimeout(debRef.current);\n if (!q.trim()) {\n setPredictions([]);\n return;\n }\n debRef.current = setTimeout(async () => {\n setBusy(true);\n try {\n const r = await mGet<{ predictions: Prediction[] }>(\n \"/maps/places-autocomplete\",\n { q },\n );\n setPredictions(r.predictions ?? []);\n } catch (e) {\n setError(String(e));\n } finally {\n setBusy(false);\n }\n }, 220);\n return () => {\n if (debRef.current) clearTimeout(debRef.current);\n };\n }, [q, open]);\n\n const choose = async (placeId: string, fallbackLabel?: string) => {\n setBusy(true);\n setError(null);\n try {\n const details = await mGet<{\n place_id: string;\n name?: string;\n formatted_address: string;\n lat: number;\n lng: number;\n }>(\"/maps/places-details\", { place_id: placeId });\n const selection: PlaceSelection = {\n place_id: details.place_id,\n name: details.name,\n address: details.formatted_address ?? fallbackLabel ?? \"\",\n lat: details.lat,\n lng: details.lng,\n };\n mPost(\"/places/recent\", {\n place_id: selection.place_id,\n label: selection.name,\n address: selection.address,\n lat: selection.lat,\n lng: selection.lng,\n }).catch(() => {});\n onSelect(selection);\n } catch (e) {\n setError(`Kunne ikke hente adresse-detaljer: ${e}`);\n } finally {\n setBusy(false);\n }\n };\n\n return (\n \n {open && (\n \n \n
    \n \n \n \n \n {title}\n
    \n \n\n
    \n \n \n setQ(e.target.value)}\n style={{\n flex: 1,\n background: \"transparent\",\n border: \"none\",\n outline: \"none\",\n color: \"white\",\n fontSize: 15,\n }}\n />\n {q && (\n setQ(\"\")}\n style={{ color: \"rgba(255,255,255,0.5)\" }}\n aria-label=\"Tøm\"\n >\n \n \n )}\n
    \n {error && (\n
    \n {error}\n
    \n )}\n \n\n \n {q.trim() ? (\n <>\n {busy && predictions.length === 0 && (\n \n Søker…\n \n )}\n {predictions.map((p) => (\n choose(p.place_id, p.description)}\n className=\"w-full text-left active:scale-[0.99] transition\"\n style={{\n display: \"flex\",\n alignItems: \"center\",\n gap: 12,\n padding: \"12px 4px\",\n borderBottom: \"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)\",\n }}\n >\n \n \n \n
    \n \n {p.main_text ?? p.description}\n
    \n {p.secondary_text && (\n \n {p.secondary_text}\n \n )}\n \n \n ))}\n \n ) : recent.length > 0 ? (\n <>\n \n Nylige steder\n \n {recent.map((r) => (\n choose(r.place_id, r.address)}\n className=\"w-full text-left active:scale-[0.99] transition\"\n style={{\n display: \"flex\",\n alignItems: \"center\",\n gap: 12,\n padding: \"12px 4px\",\n borderBottom: \"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)\",\n }}\n >\n \n \n \n
    \n \n {r.label ?? r.address}\n
    \n {r.label && (\n \n {r.address}\n \n )}\n \n \n ))}\n \n ) : (\n \n Begynn å skrive en adresse\n \n )}\n \n \n \n )}\n     \n );\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/components/driver/RideOfferPopup.tsx", "content": "import { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { motion, AnimatePresence } from \"motion/react\";\nimport { MapPin, Circle, Clock } from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { pollOffers, acceptRide, setActiveRideId, type Ride } from \"../../data/rides\";\nimport { haptic } from \"../../lib/haptics\";\n\nconst POLL_MS = 4000;\nconst COUNTDOWN_SECS = 30;\n\nexport function RideOfferPopup({\n enabled,\n onAccepted,\n}: {\n enabled: boolean;\n onAccepted: (ride: Ride) => void;\n}) {\n const [offer, setOffer] = useState(null);\n const [secs, setSecs] = useState(COUNTDOWN_SECS);\n const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);\n const [error, setError] = useState(null);\n const [dismissed, setDismissed] = useState>(new Set());\n\n // Poll for offers\n useEffect(() => {\n if (!enabled) return;\n let stop = false;\n let timer: ReturnType;\n\n const tick = async () => {\n if (stop) return;\n try {\n const offers = await pollOffers();\n const fresh = offers.find((o) => !dismissed.has(o.id));\n if (fresh && (!offer || offer.id !== fresh.id)) {\n setOffer(fresh);\n setSecs(COUNTDOWN_SECS);\n haptic([10, 40, 10, 40, 10]);\n }\n } catch {\n /* swallow */\n }\n if (!stop) timer = setTimeout(tick, POLL_MS);\n };\n tick();\n return () => {\n stop = true;\n if (timer) clearTimeout(timer);\n };\n }, [enabled, offer?.id, dismissed]);\n\n // Countdown\n useEffect(() => {\n if (!offer) return;\n if (secs <= 0) {\n setDismissed((s) => new Set(s).add(offer.id));\n setOffer(null);\n return;\n }\n const t = setTimeout(() => setSecs((s) => s - 1), 1000);\n return () => clearTimeout(t);\n }, [secs, offer]);\n\n const handleAccept = async () => {\n if (!offer) return;\n setBusy(true);\n setError(null);\n try {\n const ride = await acceptRide(offer.id);\n setActiveRideId(ride.id);\n haptic([12, 60, 12]);\n setOffer(null);\n onAccepted(ride);\n } catch (e) {\n setError(String(e));\n setDismissed((s) => new Set(s).add(offer.id));\n setTimeout(() => setOffer(null), 1500);\n } finally {\n setBusy(false);\n }\n };\n\n const handleDecline = () => {\n if (!offer) return;\n setDismissed((s) => new Set(s).add(offer.id));\n setOffer(null);\n };\n\n return (\n \n {offer && (\n \n \n
    \n \n Ny tur · {offer.tier}\n
    \n \n \n \n {secs}s\n \n \n \n\n
    \n
    \n \n
    \n \n
    \n
    \n
    {offer.pickup.address}
    \n \n {offer.destination.address}\n
    \n
    \n
    \n \n {Math.round(offer.fare.driver_payout)} kr\n
    \n \n Til deg\n
    \n \n \n\n \n {offer.distance_km.toFixed(1)} km\n ·\n {offer.duration_min} min\n ·\n Total {offer.fare.total} kr (MVA inkl.)\n \n\n {error && (\n
    {error}
    \n )}\n\n
    \n \n Avslå\n \n \n {busy ? \"Aksepterer…\" : \"Aksepter tur\"}\n \n
    \n \n \n )}\n     \n );\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/components/legal/ConsentModal.tsx", "content": "import { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { motion, AnimatePresence } from \"motion/react\";\nimport { Shield, Check } from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { mGet, mPost } from \"../../lib/makeServer\";\n\nconst VERSION = \"2026-06-07\";\nconst LS_KEY = `kjapp.consent.${VERSION}`;\n\ntype Choice = {\n key: string;\n type: string;\n required: boolean;\n label: string;\n desc: string;\n};\n\nconst CHOICES: Choice[] = [\n {\n key: \"gdpr\",\n type: \"gdpr\",\n required: true,\n label: \"Personvern og bruksvilkår\",\n desc: \"Jeg godtar personvernerklæringen og bruksvilkårene.\",\n },\n {\n key: \"location_share\",\n type: \"location_share\",\n required: true,\n label: \"Lokasjon for tur-bestilling\",\n desc: \"GPS brukes kun ved aktiv tur og adresse-søk.\",\n },\n {\n key: \"marketing\",\n type: \"marketing\",\n required: false,\n label: \"E-post med tilbud (valgfritt)\",\n desc: \"Du kan slå av når som helst i Innstillinger.\",\n },\n];\n\nexport function ConsentModal({\n onAccepted,\n navigateTo,\n}: {\n onAccepted?: () => void;\n navigateTo: (target: \"privacy\" | \"terms\") => void;\n}) {\n const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);\n const [granted, setGranted] = useState>({\n gdpr: false,\n location_share: false,\n marketing: false,\n });\n const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);\n const [error, setError] = useState(null);\n\n useEffect(() => {\n // Quick local check first to avoid flicker\n if (localStorage.getItem(LS_KEY) === \"1\") return;\n // Then confirm with server (authoritative)\n mGet<{ accepted: boolean }>(\"/consent/status\")\n .then((r) => {\n if (r.accepted) {\n localStorage.setItem(LS_KEY, \"1\");\n } else {\n setOpen(true);\n }\n })\n .catch(() => {\n // No server / not logged in → show modal anyway, server call will fail\n // gracefully on submit\n setOpen(true);\n });\n }, []);\n\n const canSubmit = CHOICES.filter((c) => c.required).every((c) => granted[c.key]);\n\n const submit = async () => {\n if (!canSubmit) {\n setError(\"Du må godta personvern og lokasjon for å bruke KJAPP.\");\n return;\n }\n setBusy(true);\n setError(null);\n try {\n await mPost(\"/consent/log\", {\n consents: CHOICES.map((c) => ({\n type: c.type,\n granted: granted[c.key] ?? false,\n version: VERSION,\n })),\n });\n localStorage.setItem(LS_KEY, \"1\");\n setOpen(false);\n onAccepted?.();\n } catch (e) {\n // Server unavailable → still close so prototype works; user can re-grant later\n localStorage.setItem(LS_KEY, \"1\");\n setOpen(false);\n onAccepted?.();\n console.warn(\"Consent log failed (server unavailable):\", e);\n } finally {\n setBusy(false);\n }\n };\n\n return (\n \n {open && (\n \n \n
    \n \n \n Samtykke — versjon {VERSION}\n
    \n \n\n
    \n Før du kan bruke KJAPP\n
    \n\n
    \n NexoraHub AS behandler dine data i henhold til GDPR. Du kan trekke\n samtykke når som helst i Innstillinger.\n
    \n\n
    \n {CHOICES.map((c) => (\n \n setGranted((s) => ({ ...s, [c.key]: !s[c.key] }))\n }\n className=\"text-left active:scale-[0.99] transition\"\n style={{\n display: \"flex\",\n gap: 12,\n padding: 12,\n borderRadius: 14,\n background: \"rgba(255,255,255,0.04)\",\n border: granted[c.key]\n ? \"1px solid rgba(94,240,255,0.5)\"\n : \"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)\",\n }}\n >\n \n {granted[c.key] && (\n \n )}\n
    \n
    \n
    \n {c.label}\n {c.required && (\n \n PÅKREVD\n \n )}\n
    \n
    \n {c.desc}\n
    \n
    \n \n ))}\n \n\n \n \n \n \n\n {error && (\n
    {error}
    \n )}\n\n \n {busy ? \"Lagrer…\" : \"Godta og fortsett\"}\n \n \n \n )}\n     \n );\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/components/legal/LegalScreen.tsx", "content": "import { ChevronLeft } from \"lucide-react\";\nimport type { ReactNode } from \"react\";\n\nexport function LegalScreen({\n title,\n subtitle,\n onBack,\n children,\n}: {\n title: string;\n subtitle?: string;\n onBack: () => void;\n children: ReactNode;\n}) {\n return (\n \n
    \n \n \n \n
    \n \n {title}\n
    \n {subtitle && (\n
    \n {subtitle}\n
    \n )}\n
    \n \n\n \n {children}\n \n \n );\n}\n\nexport function H({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) {\n return (\n \n {children}\n \n );\n}\n\nexport function P({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) {\n return

    {children}

    ;\n}\n\nexport function L({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) {\n return (\n
      \n {children}\n
    \n );\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/data/mockData.ts", "content": "export const user = {\n name: \"Mathilde\",\n initial: \"M\",\n member: \"Kjapp+\",\n rating: 4.97,\n trips: 142,\n savedPlaces: [\n { id: \"home\", label: \"Hjem\", address: \"Thorvald Meyers gate 41, Grünerløkka\", icon: \"home\" },\n { id: \"work\", label: \"Jobb\", address: \"Aker Brygge 12, 0250 Oslo\", icon: \"briefcase\" },\n { id: \"gym\", label: \"SATS Majorstuen\", address: \"Kirkeveien 64B\", icon: \"dumbbell\" },\n ],\n};\n\nexport const suggestions = [\n { id: \"1\", place: \"Gardermoen\", note: \"SK4421 kl. 19:40 — dra 17:05\", time: \"17:05\", co2: 9.4 },\n { id: \"2\", place: \"Maaemo, Schweigaards gate\", note: \"Bordet ditt kl. 20:00\", time: \"19:30\", co2: 0.6 },\n { id: \"3\", place: \"Operaen\", note: \"I kalenderen din i kveld\", time: \"18:15\", co2: 0.9 },\n { id: \"4\", place: \"Grünerløkka\", note: \"Vanlig fredagsrute\", time: \"—\", co2: 0.4 },\n];\n\nexport const carOptions = [\n { id: \"eco\", name: \"Kjapp Eco\", desc: \"El-bil · 0 g CO₂\", eta: \"3 min\", price: 189, icon: \"zap\", co2: 0 },\n { id: \"std\", name: \"Kjapp Standard\", desc: \"1–4 personer\", eta: \"2 min\", price: 219, icon: \"car\", co2: 0.6 },\n { id: \"prem\", name: \"Kjapp Premium\", desc: \"Mercedes EQS · stille\", eta: \"5 min\", price: 389, icon: \"gem\", co2: 0 },\n { id: \"xl\", name: \"Kjapp XL\", desc: \"Plass til 6 · bagasje\", eta: \"7 min\", price: 329, icon: \"truck\", co2: 0.9 },\n];\n\nexport const driver = {\n name: \"Jonas Berg\",\n rating: 4.99,\n trips: 3812,\n car: \"Mercedes EQS\",\n plate: \"EK 41209\",\n color: \"Midnattsblå\",\n eta: 3,\n};\n\nexport const auroraIntro = [\n \"Hei Mathilde.\",\n \"Du har bord på Maaemo kl. 20:00.\",\n \"Skal jeg hente deg 19:30?\",\n];\n\nexport const auroraQuickReplies = [\n \"Rekk neste T-bane\",\n \"Planlegg taxi til bussen\",\n \"Del reisen med familien\",\n \"Lag en chill Ride Vibe\",\n \"Bestill taxi til kalenderavtale\",\n \"Følg flytiden min\",\n \"Finn smarteste vei med KJAPP + kollektiv\",\n \"Hvordan er trafikken?\",\n \"Plan for helga\",\n];\n\nexport const auroraResponses: Record = {\n vits: \"Hvorfor søkte T-banen jobb som komiker? Den hadde alltid gode linjer.\",\n nyheter: \"Tre korte fra Oslo: ny gangbro i Bjørvika neste måned, Vigeland-utstillingen forlenges til august, og 18 °C og klart i kveld. Fint vær på Sørenga.\",\n restaurant: \"Hrímnir Ramen på Løkka — 12 min unna, ledig bord 19:15. Eller Smalhans, plass kl 20 om du vil sitte stille.\",\n trafikk: \"E18 vestover går greit. Litt kø på Ring 3 ved Sinsen — jeg tar deg via Trondheimsveien. Sparer 6 minutter.\",\n helg: \"Lørdag: bryllup hos Sofie kl 14, retur 23:30 er booket. Søndag: tur til Sognsvann, 22 °C og sol. Skal jeg holde av brunsj 11?\",\n ruter: \"T-banelinje 5 går fra Carl Berner om 4 min — Kjapp henter deg på Stortinget 17:42. Du kommer fram likt og sparer 84 kr.\",\n};\n\nexport const availableCars = [\n { id: \"c1\", x: 150, y: 200, eta: 2, tier: \"Standard\", plate: \"EK 41209\" },\n { id: \"c2\", x: 240, y: 260, eta: 4, tier: \"Eco\", plate: \"EL 88421\" },\n { id: \"c3\", x: 95, y: 290, eta: 5, tier: \"Standard\", plate: \"EK 22107\" },\n { id: \"c4\", x: 295, y: 175, eta: 6, tier: \"Premium\", plate: \"EK 90021\" },\n];\n\nexport const rideHistory = [\n { id: \"r1\", from: \"Hjem\", to: \"Aker Brygge\", date: \"I går\", price: 219 },\n { id: \"r2\", from: \"Tøyen T\", to: \"Gardermoen\", date: \"Mandag\", price: 689 },\n { id: \"r3\", from: \"Operaen\", to: \"Hjem\", date: \"Lørdag\", price: 245 },\n];\n"}, {"path": "src/app/data/driverMockData.ts", "content": "export const driverProfile = {\n name: \"Jonas Berg\",\n firstName: \"Jonas\",\n initial: \"J\",\n rating: 4.99,\n trips: 3812,\n car: \"Mercedes EQS · EK 41209\",\n level: \"Diamant-sjåfør\",\n kjøreseddel: { id: \"KS-92841\", validUntil: \"2027-04-12\", status: \"Gyldig\" },\n orgnr: \"924 015 832\",\n};\n\nexport const todayStats = {\n earnings: 2840,\n goal: 3500,\n trips: 11,\n hours: 6.2,\n acceptanceRate: 96,\n rating: 4.99,\n drivingTime: 4.5, // sammenhengende kjøretid (timer) — Yrkestransportloven 4.5t maks før pause\n mva: 568, // 25 % av netto\n netto: 2272,\n};\n\nexport const earningsHourly = [\n { h: \"08\", kr: 220 },\n { h: \"09\", kr: 380 },\n { h: \"10\", kr: 290 },\n { h: \"11\", kr: 410 },\n { h: \"12\", kr: 520 },\n { h: \"13\", kr: 470 },\n { h: \"14\", kr: 550 },\n];\n\nexport const driverAuroraTips = [\n {\n type: \"hotspot\",\n title: \"Hot zone om 8 min\",\n body: \"Aker Brygge — fredagslunsj er i gang. 14 aktive forespørsler nå, kun 6 sjåfører i nærheten.\",\n cta: \"Naviger dit\",\n },\n {\n type: \"break\",\n title: \"Pause om 25 min?\",\n body: \"Du har kjørt 2t 15min sammenhengende. Sognsvann-rundkjøringen har gratis lading + kafé.\",\n cta: \"Planlegg pause\",\n },\n {\n type: \"earn\",\n title: \"Bonus aktivert\",\n body: \"Tjen 250 kr ekstra hvis du fullfører 3 turer før 18:00. Du er på god vei.\",\n cta: \"Vis detaljer\",\n },\n];\n\nexport const driverSelf = { x: 195, y: 245 }; // sjåførens egen posisjon på Oslo-kartet\n\n// Sjåføren er invitert av en flåteeier — kan aldri registrere seg selv\nexport const fleet = {\n name: \"Oslo Taxi Sentralen AS\",\n orgnr: \"924 015 832\",\n invitedBy: \"Lars Hagen\",\n invitedAt: \"2025-11-08\",\n contactPhone: \"+47 22 38 80 90\",\n cars: [\n { id: \"car-1\", model: \"Mercedes EQS\", plate: \"EK 41209\", year: 2025, color: \"Midnattsblå\", tier: \"Premium\", active: true, status: \"Tilgjengelig\" },\n { id: \"car-2\", model: \"Tesla Model Y\", plate: \"EL 88421\", year: 2024, color: \"Grafittgrå\", tier: \"Eco\", active: false, status: \"Tilgjengelig\" },\n { id: \"car-3\", model: \"Volkswagen ID. Buzz\", plate: \"EK 22107\", year: 2024, color: \"Hvit/blå\", tier: \"XL\", active: false, status: \"På verksted\" },\n { id: \"car-4\", model: \"BMW i7\", plate: \"EK 90021\", year: 2025, color: \"Sort\", tier: \"Premium\", active: false, status: \"Brukes av annen sjåfør\" },\n ],\n};\n\nexport const hotZones = [\n { id: \"hz1\", x: 245, y: 215, intensity: \"Høy\", demand: 14, label: \"Aker Brygge\" },\n { id: \"hz2\", x: 125, y: 175, intensity: \"Middels\", demand: 7, label: \"Grünerløkka\" },\n { id: \"hz3\", x: 290, y: 105, intensity: \"Lav\", demand: 3, label: \"Tøyen\" },\n];\n\nexport const incomingRide = {\n pickup: \"Thorvald Meyers gate 41, Grünerløkka\",\n destination: \"Maaemo, Schweigaards gate 15\",\n distance: \"4.2 km\",\n duration: \"12 min\",\n fare: 219,\n surge: 1.0,\n passenger: { name: \"Mathilde\", rating: 4.97 },\n countdown: 12,\n};\n"}, {"path": "src/app/data/types.ts", "content": "export type LngLat = [number, number];\n\nexport type DriverStatus = \"available\" | \"busy\" | \"offline\";\n\nexport type NearbyDriver = {\n id: string;\n lngLat: LngLat;\n headingDeg: number;\n status: DriverStatus;\n etaMin: number;\n plate: string;\n tier: \"Eco\" | \"Standard\" | \"Premium\" | \"XL\";\n};\n\nexport const OSLO_CENTER: LngLat = [10.7522, 59.9139];\n"}, {"path": "src/app/data/useNearbyDrivers.ts", "content": "import { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\nimport type { NearbyDriver, LngLat } from \"./types\";\nimport { OSLO_CENTER } from \"./types\";\n\nconst SEED: NearbyDriver[] = [\n { id: \"c1\", lngLat: [10.7585, 59.9241], headingDeg: 220, status: \"available\", etaMin: 2, plate: \"EK 41209\", tier: \"Standard\" },\n { id: \"c2\", lngLat: [10.7475, 59.9128], headingDeg: 90, status: \"available\", etaMin: 3, plate: \"EL 88421\", tier: \"Eco\" },\n { id: \"c3\", lngLat: [10.7392, 59.9165], headingDeg: 45, status: \"busy\", etaMin: 6, plate: \"EK 22107\", tier: \"Standard\" },\n { id: \"c4\", lngLat: [10.7641, 59.9192], headingDeg: 300, status: \"available\", etaMin: 4, plate: \"EK 90021\", tier: \"Premium\" },\n { id: \"c5\", lngLat: [10.7556, 59.9098], headingDeg: 180, status: \"available\", etaMin: 5, plate: \"EK 33102\", tier: \"XL\" },\n { id: \"c6\", lngLat: [10.7438, 59.9220], headingDeg: 135, status: \"busy\", etaMin: 7, plate: \"EL 71204\", tier: \"Eco\" },\n { id: \"c7\", lngLat: [10.7689, 59.9145], headingDeg: 260, status: \"available\", etaMin: 6, plate: \"EK 55491\", tier: \"Standard\" },\n { id: \"c8\", lngLat: [10.7510, 59.9275], headingDeg: 10, status: \"available\", etaMin: 3, plate: \"EL 12388\", tier: \"Eco\" },\n { id: \"c9\", lngLat: [10.7720, 59.9082], headingDeg: 200, status: \"busy\", etaMin: 9, plate: \"EK 80014\", tier: \"Premium\" },\n { id: \"c10\", lngLat: [10.7405, 59.9050], headingDeg: 70, status: \"available\", etaMin: 8, plate: \"EL 44220\", tier: \"Standard\" },\n];\n\nconst BOUNDS = {\n minLng: 10.71,\n maxLng: 10.80,\n minLat: 59.895,\n maxLat: 59.940,\n};\n\nconst STEP_M = 25;\nconst TICK_MS = 1400;\n\nfunction metersToDegLng(m: number, lat: number) {\n return m / (111320 * Math.cos((lat * Math.PI) / 180));\n}\nfunction metersToDegLat(m: number) {\n return m / 110540;\n}\n\nfunction stepDriver(d: NearbyDriver): NearbyDriver {\n if (d.status === \"offline\") return d;\n\n const jitter = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 24;\n let heading = d.headingDeg + jitter;\n\n const rad = (heading * Math.PI) / 180;\n let lng = d.lngLat[0] + metersToDegLng(Math.sin(rad) * STEP_M, d.lngLat[1]);\n let lat = d.lngLat[1] + metersToDegLat(Math.cos(rad) * STEP_M);\n\n if (lng < BOUNDS.minLng || lng > BOUNDS.maxLng || lat < BOUNDS.minLat || lat > BOUNDS.maxLat) {\n heading = (heading + 180) % 360;\n lng = d.lngLat[0];\n lat = d.lngLat[1];\n }\n\n return { ...d, lngLat: [lng, lat] as LngLat, headingDeg: (heading + 360) % 360 };\n}\n\nexport function useNearbyDrivers(_pickup: LngLat = OSLO_CENTER) {\n const [drivers, setDrivers] = useState(SEED);\n\n useEffect(() => {\n const id = setInterval(() => {\n setDrivers((prev) => {\n const next = prev.map(stepDriver);\n if (Math.random() < 0.15) {\n const i = Math.floor(Math.random() * next.length);\n const d = next[i];\n if (d.status !== \"offline\") {\n next[i] = { ...d, status: d.status === \"available\" ? \"busy\" : \"available\" };\n }\n }\n return next;\n });\n }, TICK_MS);\n return () => clearInterval(id);\n }, []);\n\n return { drivers, status: \"ok\" as const };\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/data/rides.ts", "content": "import { mGet, mPost } from \"../lib/makeServer\";\n\nexport type PlaceRef = {\n place_id?: string;\n address: string;\n lat: number;\n lng: number;\n};\n\nexport type Ride = {\n id: string;\n customer_id: string;\n driver_id: string | null;\n tier: string;\n pickup: PlaceRef;\n destination: PlaceRef;\n distance_km: number;\n duration_min: number;\n note: string | null;\n status:\n | \"requested\"\n | \"accepted\"\n | \"driver_arrived\"\n | \"in_progress\"\n | \"completed\"\n | \"cancelled\";\n fare: {\n total: number;\n net: number;\n mva: number;\n platform_fee: number;\n driver_payout: number;\n };\n requested_at: number;\n accepted_at: number | null;\n completed_at: number | null;\n cancel_reason?: string | null;\n};\n\nlet activeRideId: string | null = null;\nexport const setActiveRideId = (id: string | null) => {\n activeRideId = id;\n};\nexport const getActiveRideId = () => activeRideId;\n\nexport async function requestRide(input: {\n tier: string;\n pickup: PlaceRef;\n destination: PlaceRef;\n distance_km?: number;\n duration_min?: number;\n note?: string;\n}): Promise {\n const r = await mPost<{ ride: Ride }>(\"/rides/request\", input);\n setActiveRideId(r.ride.id);\n return r.ride;\n}\n\nexport async function pollOffers(): Promise {\n const r = await mGet<{ offers: Ride[] }>(\"/rides/offers\");\n return r.offers ?? [];\n}\n\nexport async function acceptRide(rideId: string): Promise {\n const r = await mPost<{ ride: Ride }>(\"/rides/accept\", { ride_id: rideId });\n return r.ride;\n}\n\nexport async function updateRideStatus(\n rideId: string,\n status: Ride[\"status\"],\n cancel_reason?: string,\n): Promise {\n const r = await mPost<{ ride: Ride }>(\"/rides/status\", {\n ride_id: rideId,\n status,\n cancel_reason,\n });\n return r.ride;\n}\n\nexport async function getRide(rideId: string): Promise {\n try {\n const r = await mGet<{ ride: Ride }>(`/rides/${rideId}`);\n return r.ride;\n } catch {\n return null;\n }\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/data/supabase/client.ts", "content": "import { createClient, type SupabaseClient } from \"@supabase/supabase-js\";\nimport { projectId, publicAnonKey } from \"/utils/supabase/info\";\n\nconst url =\n (import.meta.env.VITE_SUPABASE_URL as string | undefined) ??\n (projectId ? `https://${projectId}.supabase.co` : undefined);\nconst anonKey =\n (import.meta.env.VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY as string | undefined) ?? publicAnonKey;\n\nlet cached: SupabaseClient | null = null;\n\nexport function getSupabase(): SupabaseClient {\n if (cached) return cached;\n if (!url || !anonKey) {\n throw new Error(\n \"Supabase env mangler. Sett VITE_SUPABASE_URL + VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY i .env.local\",\n );\n }\n cached = createClient(url, anonKey, {\n auth: { persistSession: true, autoRefreshToken: true, detectSessionInUrl: false },\n });\n return cached;\n}\n\nexport const isSupabaseConfigured = Boolean(url && anonKey);\n"}, {"path": "src/app/data/supabase/types.ts", "content": "// Frontend-side type shapes mirroring DB. Hand-maintained until codegen is wired.\n\nexport type UserRole = \"customer\" | \"driver\" | \"fleet_owner\" | \"super_admin\";\nexport type RideStatus =\n | \"requested\" | \"matched\" | \"accepted\" | \"driver_arrived\"\n | \"in_progress\" | \"completed\" | \"cancelled\" | \"rejected\";\nexport type PaymentStatus = \"pending\" | \"authorized\" | \"captured\" | \"refunded\" | \"failed\";\nexport type PaymentProvider = \"stripe\" | \"vipps\" | \"apple_pay\" | \"google_pay\" | \"card\" | \"invoice\";\nexport type Tier = \"Eco\" | \"Standard\" | \"Premium\" | \"XL\";\n\nexport type Profile = {\n id: string;\n role: UserRole;\n full_name: string | null;\n phone: string | null;\n email: string | null;\n language: string;\n created_at: string;\n};\n\nexport type Ride = {\n id: string;\n customer_id: string;\n driver_id: string | null;\n vehicle_id: string | null;\n tier: Tier;\n status: RideStatus;\n pickup_lng: number;\n pickup_lat: number;\n pickup_address: string;\n destination_lng: number;\n destination_lat: number;\n destination_address: string;\n estimated_fare_nok: number | null;\n final_fare_nok: number | null;\n distance_km: number | null;\n duration_min: number | null;\n mva_amount_nok: number | null;\n platform_fee_nok: number | null;\n driver_payout_nok: number | null;\n requested_at: string;\n accepted_at: string | null;\n completed_at: string | null;\n};\n\nexport type Payment = {\n id: string;\n ride_id: string;\n provider: PaymentProvider;\n amount_nok: number;\n platform_fee_nok: number;\n driver_payout_nok: number;\n mva_amount_nok: number;\n status: PaymentStatus;\n captured_at: string | null;\n};\n"}, {"path": "src/app/lib/haptics.ts", "content": "export function haptic(pattern: number | number[] = 10) {\n if (typeof navigator !== \"undefined\" && \"vibrate\" in navigator) {\n try { navigator.vibrate(pattern); } catch {}\n }\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/lib/navigation.ts", "content": "// Ekstern navigasjon. Sjåføren velger app i profil (lagres i localStorage).\nexport type NavApp = \"google\" | \"apple\" | \"waze\";\nconst KEY = \"kjapp.driver.navApp\";\n\nexport function getNavApp(): NavApp {\n if (typeof window === \"undefined\") return \"google\";\n return (localStorage.getItem(KEY) as NavApp) || \"google\";\n}\n\nexport function setNavApp(app: NavApp) {\n localStorage.setItem(KEY, app);\n}\n\nexport function openExternalMap(address: string) {\n const q = encodeURIComponent(address);\n const app = getNavApp();\n const url =\n app === \"apple\" ? `https://maps.apple.com/?daddr=${q}` :\n app === \"waze\" ? `https://waze.com/ul?q=${q}&navigate=yes` :\n `https://www.google.com/maps/dir/?api=1&destination=${q}`;\n window.open(url, \"_blank\", \"noopener,noreferrer\");\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/lib/theme.ts", "content": "// Tema-styring. Dark = Polar Midnight, Light = Aurora Frost.\n// Auto følger sol opp/ned i Oslo (lat 59,91° N) — relevant fordi dagslys\n// varierer fra 0t (desember) til 24t (juni) i Norge.\nexport type Theme = \"dark\" | \"premium\" | \"light\" | \"auto\";\nconst KEY = \"kjapp.theme\";\n\nexport function getTheme(): Theme {\n if (typeof window === \"undefined\") return \"dark\";\n return (localStorage.getItem(KEY) as Theme) || \"auto\";\n}\n\n/** Approks. sol opp/ned i Oslo for gjeldende dag — i timer (lokal tid). */\nfunction osloDaylight(date = new Date()): { sunrise: number; sunset: number } {\n // Dag-på-året 0..365\n const start = new Date(date.getFullYear(), 0, 0);\n const diff = date.getTime() - start.getTime();\n const dayOfYear = Math.floor(diff / 86400000);\n // Sinusbølge sentrert rundt sommersolverv (dag 172)\n const phase = ((dayOfYear - 172) / 365) * 2 * Math.PI;\n // Oslo: solverv 03:53 / 22:43 (juni), 09:18 / 15:12 (desember)\n const sunrise = 6.6 + 2.7 * Math.cos(phase); // ~3.9 (sommer) → ~9.3 (vinter)\n const sunset = 18.9 - 3.7 * Math.cos(phase); // ~22.6 (sommer) → ~15.2 (vinter)\n return { sunrise, sunset };\n}\n\nexport function resolveTheme(t: Theme): \"dark\" | \"premium\" | \"light\" {\n if (t !== \"auto\") return t;\n const now = new Date();\n const hourFloat = now.getHours() + now.getMinutes() / 60;\n const { sunrise, sunset } = osloDaylight(now);\n return hourFloat >= sunrise && hourFloat < sunset ? \"light\" : \"dark\";\n}\n\nexport function applyTheme(t: Theme) {\n const resolved = resolveTheme(t);\n document.documentElement.setAttribute(\"data-theme\", resolved);\n}\n\nexport function setTheme(t: Theme) {\n localStorage.setItem(KEY, t);\n applyTheme(t);\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/lib/router-nav.ts", "content": "import { useNavigate } from \"react-router\";\nimport type { Screen } from \"../App\";\n\nexport const screenToPath: Record = {\n splash: \"/\",\n signin: \"/signin\",\n home: \"/home\",\n book: \"/book\",\n chat: \"/aurora\",\n track: \"/track\",\n complete: \"/complete\",\n profile: \"/profile\",\n driver: \"/driver\",\n \"driver-online-map\": \"/driver/online\",\n \"driver-ride\": \"/driver/ride\",\n \"driver-profile\": \"/driver/profile\",\n \"driver-trip-request\": \"/driver/request\",\n \"driver-navigate\": \"/driver/navigate\",\n \"driver-trip-active\": \"/driver/active\",\n \"driver-trip-complete\": \"/driver/complete\",\n \"driver-trips\": \"/driver/trips\",\n \"driver-earnings\": \"/driver/earnings\",\n \"driver-aurora-chat\": \"/driver/aurora\",\n \"driver-onboarding\": \"/driver/onboarding\",\n \"driver-arrived\": \"/driver/arrived\",\n \"ride-chat\": \"/ride/chat\",\n \"driver-chat\": \"/driver/chat\",\n voice: \"/voice\",\n \"ar-pickup\": \"/ar-pickup\",\n \"driver-signin\": \"/driver/signin\",\n \"driver-access\": \"/driver/access\",\n \"become-driver\": \"/become-driver\",\n settings: \"/settings\",\n payment: \"/settings/payment\",\n history: \"/history\",\n places: \"/settings/places\",\n support: \"/settings/support\",\n connect: \"/connect\",\n \"rekk-avgangen\": \"/rekk-avgangen\",\n \"prototype-map\": \"/_debug/map\",\n \"driver-prototype-map\": \"/driver/_debug/map\",\n \"driver-support\": \"/driver/support\",\n \"support-inbox\": \"/driver/support/inbox\",\n \"driver-vehicle-select\": \"/driver/onboarding/vehicle\",\n \"driver-nav-app-settings\": \"/driver/settings/nav-app\",\n \"driver-communication-settings\": \"/driver/settings/communication\",\n \"driver-ai-settings\": \"/driver/settings/ai\",\n \"driver-ai-policy\": \"/driver/settings/ai-policy\",\n \"driver-location-settings\": \"/driver/settings/location\",\n \"driver-consent\": \"/driver/onboarding/consent\",\n role: \"/role\",\n export: \"/export\",\n \"loyvehaver-register\": \"/loyvehaver/registrer\",\n \"fleet-dashboard\": \"/loyvehaver/flate\",\n \"super-admin-inbox\": \"/super-admin/inbox\",\n privacy: \"/legal/privacy\",\n terms: \"/legal/terms\",\n \"data-export\": \"/settings/data-export\",\n};\n\nexport function useGo() {\n const navigate = useNavigate();\n return (s: Screen) => navigate(screenToPath[s]);\n}\n\nexport function useGoBack() {\n const navigate = useNavigate();\n return () => navigate(-1);\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/lib/auth.ts", "content": "import { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { getSupabase, isSupabaseConfigured } from \"../data/supabase/client\";\nimport type { Profile } from \"../data/supabase/types\";\n\nexport type AuthState = {\n loading: boolean;\n userId: string | null;\n profile: Profile | null;\n configured: boolean;\n};\n\nexport function useAuth(): AuthState {\n const [state, setState] = useState({\n loading: true,\n userId: null,\n profile: null,\n configured: isSupabaseConfigured,\n });\n\n useEffect(() => {\n if (!isSupabaseConfigured) {\n setState((s) => ({ ...s, loading: false }));\n return;\n }\n const sb = getSupabase();\n let active = true;\n\n const load = async () => {\n const { data: { session } } = await sb.auth.getSession();\n if (!active) return;\n if (!session) {\n setState({ loading: false, userId: null, profile: null, configured: true });\n return;\n }\n const { data: profile } = await sb\n .from(\"profiles\")\n .select(\"*\")\n .eq(\"id\", session.user.id)\n .single();\n if (!active) return;\n setState({ loading: false, userId: session.user.id, profile, configured: true });\n };\n\n load();\n const { data: sub } = sb.auth.onAuthStateChange(() => load());\n return () => { active = false; sub.subscription.unsubscribe(); };\n }, []);\n\n return state;\n}\n\n/** Send a SMS OTP to a Norwegian phone number. Supabase Auth handles SMS via provider. */\nexport async function sendOtp(phone: string): Promise<{ error?: string }> {\n if (!isSupabaseConfigured) return { error: \"Supabase ikke konfigurert\" };\n const normalized = normalizeNorwegianPhone(phone);\n if (!normalized) return { error: \"Ugyldig norsk mobilnummer\" };\n const sb = getSupabase();\n const { error } = await sb.auth.signInWithOtp({ phone: normalized });\n return error ? { error: error.message } : {};\n}\n\nexport async function verifyOtp(phone: string, token: string): Promise<{ error?: string }> {\n if (!isSupabaseConfigured) return { error: \"Supabase ikke konfigurert\" };\n const normalized = normalizeNorwegianPhone(phone);\n if (!normalized) return { error: \"Ugyldig norsk mobilnummer\" };\n const sb = getSupabase();\n const { error } = await sb.auth.verifyOtp({\n phone: normalized,\n token,\n type: \"sms\",\n });\n return error ? { error: error.message } : {};\n}\n\nexport async function signOut(): Promise {\n if (!isSupabaseConfigured) return;\n await getSupabase().auth.signOut();\n}\n\n/** Accepts \"9XX XX XXX\", \"+47…\", \"0047…\", \"47XXXXXXXX\". Returns \"+47XXXXXXXX\" or null. */\nexport function normalizeNorwegianPhone(raw: string): string | null {\n const digits = raw.replace(/\\D/g, \"\");\n if (digits.length === 8) return `+47${digits}`;\n if (digits.startsWith(\"47\") && digits.length === 10) return `+${digits}`;\n if (digits.startsWith(\"0047\") && digits.length === 12) return `+${digits.slice(2)}`;\n return null;\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/lib/edge.ts", "content": "// Typed helper for calling Supabase Edge Functions with the user's JWT.\n\nimport { getSupabase, isSupabaseConfigured } from \"../data/supabase/client\";\n\nexport async function callEdge(\n name: string,\n body?: Record,\n opts?: { method?: \"POST\" | \"GET\"; query?: Record },\n): Promise {\n if (!isSupabaseConfigured) throw new Error(\"Supabase ikke konfigurert\");\n const sb = getSupabase();\n const { data: { session } } = await sb.auth.getSession();\n const url = import.meta.env.VITE_SUPABASE_URL as string;\n const qs = opts?.query\n ? \"?\" + new URLSearchParams(opts.query).toString()\n : \"\";\n const res = await fetch(`${url}/functions/v1/${name}${qs}`, {\n method: opts?.method ?? \"POST\",\n headers: {\n \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n Authorization: `Bearer ${session?.access_token ?? import.meta.env.VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY}`,\n apikey: import.meta.env.VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY as string,\n },\n body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n });\n if (!res.ok) {\n const text = await res.text();\n throw new Error(`${name} ${res.status}: ${text}`);\n }\n return res.json();\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/app/lib/makeServer.ts", "content": "import { projectId, publicAnonKey } from \"/utils/supabase/info\";\nimport { getSupabase, isSupabaseConfigured } from \"../data/supabase/client\";\n\nconst BASE = `https://${projectId}.supabase.co/functions/v1/make-server-371148df`;\n\nasync function authHeader(): Promise {\n if (!isSupabaseConfigured) return `Bearer ${publicAnonKey}`;\n try {\n const { data: { session } } = await getSupabase().auth.getSession();\n return `Bearer ${session?.access_token ?? publicAnonKey}`;\n } catch {\n return `Bearer ${publicAnonKey}`;\n }\n}\n\nasync function userId(): Promise {\n if (!isSupabaseConfigured) return null;\n try {\n const { data: { user } } = await getSupabase().auth.getUser();\n return user?.id ?? null;\n } catch {\n return null;\n }\n}\n\nexport async function mGet(\n path: string,\n query?: Record,\n): Promise {\n const qs = query ? \"?\" + new URLSearchParams(query).toString() : \"\";\n const uid = await userId();\n const r = await fetch(`${BASE}${path}${qs}`, {\n headers: {\n Authorization: await authHeader(),\n apikey: publicAnonKey,\n ...(uid ? { \"x-user-id\": uid } : {}),\n },\n });\n if (!r.ok) throw new Error(`${path} ${r.status}: ${await r.text()}`);\n return r.json();\n}\n\nexport async function mPost(\n path: string,\n body?: Record,\n): Promise {\n const uid = await userId();\n const r = await fetch(`${BASE}${path}`, {\n method: \"POST\",\n headers: {\n \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n Authorization: await authHeader(),\n apikey: publicAnonKey,\n ...(uid ? { \"x-user-id\": uid } : {}),\n },\n body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n });\n if (!r.ok) throw new Error(`${path} ${r.status}: ${await r.text()}`);\n return r.json();\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/styles/tailwind.css", "content": "@import 'tailwindcss' source(none);\n@source '../**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx}';\n\n@import 'tw-animate-css';\n"}, {"path": "src/styles/index.css", "content": "@import './fonts.css';\n@import './tailwind.css';\n@import './theme.css';\n@import './tokens.css';\n@import 'maplibre-gl/dist/maplibre-gl.css';\n"}, {"path": "src/styles/fonts.css", "content": "@import url(\"https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Instrument+Serif:ital@0;1&family=Space+Grotesk:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Inter+Tight:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Geist+Mono:wght@400;500;600&display=swap\");\n"}, {"path": "src/styles/theme.css", "content": "@custom-variant dark (&:is(.dark *));\n\n:root {\n --font-size: 16px;\n --font-display: \"Space Grotesk\", \"Inter Tight\", system-ui, sans-serif;\n --font-body: \"Inter Tight\", \"Inter\", system-ui, sans-serif;\n --font-mono: \"Geist Mono\", \"JetBrains Mono\", ui-monospace, monospace;\n --font-editorial: \"Instrument Serif\", \"Times New Roman\", serif;\n\n /* Polar Midnight — grønnstukket nordlyshimmel med varm violet undertone (Tromsø, klar natt) */\n --aurora-bg-0: #050410;\n --aurora-bg-1: #0a0820;\n --aurora-bg-2: #120b2e;\n
