--aurora-cyan: #5ef0ff;\n --aurora-violet: #a06bff;\n --aurora-magenta: #ff5ed1;\n --aurora-pink: #ff8fb6;\n --aurora-mint: #6bffc7;\n /* Tema-skiftbare aksenter — overskrives av [data-theme] */\n --bg-base: var(--aurora-bg-0);\n --bg-panel: var(--aurora-bg-1);\n --text-strong: #ffffff;\n --text-muted: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);\n /* Sjåfør cockpit-bakgrunn — overskrives av [data-theme] */\n --driver-bg-0: #050405;\n --driver-bg-1: #0e0a07;\n --driver-bg-2: #1a1208;\n /* Sjåfør-app sub-brand: cockpit / amber */\n --kjapp-amber: #ffb547;\n --kjapp-amber-deep: #d97706;\n --kjapp-graphite: #14121d;\n --kjapp-amber-gradient: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffd089 0%, #ffb547 50%, #d97706 100%);\n --kjapp-amber-soft: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,181,71,0.22) 0%, rgba(217,119,6,0.18) 100%);\n --aurora-glow: 0 0 40px rgba(94, 240, 255, 0.45), 0 0 80px rgba(160, 107, 255, 0.35);\n --aurora-glow-soft: 0 0 24px rgba(94, 240, 255, 0.25);\n --aurora-gradient: linear-gradient(135deg, #5ef0ff 0%, #a06bff 50%, #ff5ed1 100%);\n --aurora-gradient-soft: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(94, 240, 255, 0.25) 0%, rgba(160, 107, 255, 0.25) 50%, rgba(255, 94, 209, 0.25) 100%);\n --glass-bg: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04);\n --glass-border: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);\n\n /* KJAPP brand-tokens — felles på tvers av tema (overskrives per [data-theme]) */\n --surface: var(--aurora-bg-1);\n --surface-glass: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);\n --primary-cyan: #5ef0ff;\n --primary-blue: #6aa8ff;\n --vipps-orange: #ff5b24;\n --vipps-orange-deep: #e34a18;\n --vipps-orange-light: #ff7a4a;\n --text-primary: #ffffff;\n --text-secondary: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);\n --border-glow: rgba(94, 240, 255, 0.28);\n --button-secondary: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);\n --driver-accent: #ffb547;\n\n --background: #ffffff;\n --foreground: oklch(0.145 0 0);\n --card: #ffffff;\n --card-foreground: oklch(0.145 0 0);\n --popover: oklch(1 0 0);\n --popover-foreground: oklch(0.145 0 0);\n --primary: #030213;\n --primary-foreground: oklch(1 0 0);\n --secondary: oklch(0.95 0.0058 264.53);\n --secondary-foreground: #030213;\n --muted: #ececf0;\n --muted-foreground: #717182;\n --accent: #e9ebef;\n --accent-foreground: #030213;\n --destructive: #d4183d;\n --destructive-foreground: #ffffff;\n --border: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);\n --input: transparent;\n --input-background: #f3f3f5;\n --switch-background: #cbced4;\n --font-weight-medium: 500;\n --font-weight-normal: 400;\n --ring: oklch(0.708 0 0);\n --chart-1: oklch(0.646 0.222 41.116);\n --chart-2: oklch(0.6 0.118 184.704);\n --chart-3: oklch(0.398 0.07 227.392);\n --chart-4: oklch(0.828 0.189 84.429);\n --chart-5: oklch(0.769 0.188 70.08);\n --radius: 0.625rem;\n --sidebar: oklch(0.985 0 0);\n --sidebar-foreground: oklch(0.145 0 0);\n --sidebar-primary: #030213;\n --sidebar-primary-foreground: oklch(0.985 0 0);\n --sidebar-accent: oklch(0.97 0 0);\n --sidebar-accent-foreground: oklch(0.205 0 0);\n --sidebar-border: oklch(0.922 0 0);\n --sidebar-ring: oklch(0.708 0 0);\n}\n\n/* Premium \"Obsidian Gold\" — onyx-svart base, champagne-gull aksent, helt egen identitet */\n[data-theme=\"premium\"] {\n --aurora-bg-0: #0a0805;\n --aurora-bg-1: #15100a;\n --aurora-bg-2: #1f1810;\n --aurora-cyan: #f5d98a; /* champagne */\n --aurora-violet: #d4a857; /* gull */\n --aurora-magenta: #b8863d; /* dypt gull */\n --aurora-mint: #ead7a1; /* lys champagne */\n --aurora-pink: #e8c574;\n --aurora-gradient: linear-gradient(135deg, #f5d98a 0%, #d4a857 50%, #8a5e22 100%);\n --aurora-gradient-soft: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(245,217,138,0.25) 0%, rgba(212,168,87,0.25) 50%, rgba(138,94,34,0.25) 100%);\n --aurora-glow: 0 0 40px rgba(245,217,138,0.45), 0 0 80px rgba(212,168,87,0.35);\n --aurora-glow-soft: 0 0 24px rgba(245,217,138,0.25);\n --glass-bg: rgba(245,217,138,0.04);\n --glass-border: rgba(245,217,138,0.12);\n --driver-bg-0: #0a0805;\n --driver-bg-1: #18110a;\n --driver-bg-2: #261a0d;\n}\n[data-theme=\"premium\"] .glass-panel {\n background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(245,217,138,0.06), rgba(245,217,138,0.02));\n border-color: rgba(245,217,138,0.14);\n box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(245,217,138,0.08), 0 8px 32px -16px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);\n}\n[data-theme=\"premium\"] .holo-border {\n box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(245,217,138,0.22);\n}\n\n/* Lys \"Aurora Frost\" — isbre-hvit base, beholder holografisk aurora-aksent.\n Tilpasset Norge: kjølig klarhet om dagen, fortsatt nordlys-identitet. */\n[data-theme=\"light\"] {\n --aurora-bg-0: #f0f4f9; /* isbre / snø i dis */\n --aurora-bg-1: #e2eaf3;\n --aurora-bg-2: #d6dff0;\n --aurora-cyan: #0891b2; /* dypere cyan så den leser mot lys */\n --aurora-violet: #7c3aed; /* violett som holder vekt */\n --aurora-magenta: #db2777; /* magenta som ikke blir pastell */\n --aurora-mint: #059669; /* skog-grønn */\n --aurora-pink: #e879a8;\n --aurora-gradient: linear-gradient(135deg, #0891b2 0%, #7c3aed 50%, #db2777 100%);\n --aurora-gradient-soft: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(8,145,178,0.18) 0%, rgba(124,58,237,0.18) 50%, rgba(219,39,119,0.18) 100%);\n --aurora-glow: 0 0 40px rgba(8,145,178,0.35), 0 0 80px rgba(124,58,237,0.25);\n --aurora-glow-soft: 0 0 24px rgba(8,145,178,0.2);\n --bg-base: #f0f4f9;\n --bg-panel: rgba(255,255,255,0.65);\n --glass-bg: rgba(255,255,255,0.55);\n --glass-border: rgba(15,23,42,0.10);\n --text-strong: #0f172a;\n --text-muted: rgba(15,23,42,0.65);\n /* Sjåfør holder amber-cockpit men i is-glass — varmen Norge trenger om dagen også */\n --driver-bg-0: #f3ede0;\n --driver-bg-1: #e6dac3;\n --driver-bg-2: #d6c39e;\n}\n[data-theme=\"light\"] .glass-panel {\n background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.78), rgba(255,255,255,0.55));\n border-color: rgba(20,18,32,0.12);\n box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.6) inset, 0 8px 24px -12px rgba(20,18,32,0.18);\n}\n[data-theme=\"light\"] .holo-border {\n box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(30,107,138,0.18);\n}\n[data-theme=\"light\"] {\n --surface: rgba(255,255,255,0.85);\n --surface-glass: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);\n --text-primary: #0f172a;\n --text-secondary: rgba(15,23,42,0.65);\n --border-glow: rgba(8,145,178,0.25);\n --button-secondary: rgba(15,23,42,0.05);\n}\n[data-theme=\"premium\"] {\n --surface: rgba(245,217,138,0.06);\n --surface-glass: rgba(245,217,138,0.05);\n --primary-cyan: #f5d98a;\n --primary-blue: #d4a857;\n --border-glow: rgba(245,217,138,0.3);\n --button-secondary: rgba(245,217,138,0.04);\n}\n\n/* I lys-tema er hvit tekst usynlig på krembakgrunn — invertér til mørk blekk.\n Vi target Tailwind sine text-white utilities (også med opacitet). */\n[data-theme=\"light\"] .text-white,\n[data-theme=\"light\"] [class*=\"text-white/\"] {\n color: #14121d !important;\n}\n[data-theme=\"light\"] .text-white\\/90 { color: rgba(20,18,32,0.92) !important; }\n[data-theme=\"light\"] .text-white\\/80 { color: rgba(20,18,32,0.82) !important; }\n[data-theme=\"light\"] .text-white\\/75 { color: rgba(20,18,32,0.78) !important; }\n[data-theme=\"light\"] .text-white\\/70 { color: rgba(20,18,32,0.72) !important; }\n[data-theme=\"light\"] .text-white\\/65 { color: rgba(20,18,32,0.68) !important; }\n[data-theme=\"light\"] .text-white\\/60 { color: rgba(20,18,32,0.62) !important; }\n[data-theme=\"light\"] .text-white\\/55 { color: rgba(20,18,32,0.58) !important; }\n[data-theme=\"light\"] .text-white\\/50 { color: rgba(20,18,32,0.55) !important; }\n[data-theme=\"light\"] .text-white\\/45 { color: rgba(20,18,32,0.5) !important; }\n[data-theme=\"light\"] .text-white\\/40 { color: rgba(20,18,32,0.45) !important; }\n[data-theme=\"light\"] .text-white\\/35 { color: rgba(20,18,32,0.4) !important; }\n[data-theme=\"light\"] .text-white\\/30 { color: rgba(20,18,32,0.35) !important; }\n\n/* Hvite bakgrunns-pixler på knapper/chips → svake blekk-flekker i lyst tema */\n[data-theme=\"light\"] [class*=\"bg-white/\"] {\n background-color: rgba(20,18,32,0.06) !important;\n}\n[data-theme=\"light\"] [class*=\"border-white/\"] {\n border-color: rgba(20,18,32,0.12) !important;\n}\n\n/* Map-overlay gradients bruker mørk hex — bytt til is-hvit i lys */\n[data-theme=\"light\"] .from-\\[\\#05060f\\]\\/85 { --tw-gradient-from: rgba(240,244,249,0.85) !important; }\n[data-theme=\"light\"] .from-\\[\\#05060f\\]\\/80 { --tw-gradient-from: rgba(240,244,249,0.80) !important; }\n[data-theme=\"light\"] .from-\\[\\#05060f\\]\\/55 { --tw-gradient-from: rgba(240,244,249,0.55) !important; }\n[data-theme=\"light\"] .from-\\[\\#05060f\\]\\/30 { --tw-gradient-from: rgba(240,244,249,0.30) !important; }\n[data-theme=\"light\"] .from-\\[\\#05060f\\] { --tw-gradient-from: rgba(240,244,249,1) !important; }\n[data-theme=\"light\"] .via-\\[\\#05060f\\]\\/20 { --tw-gradient-via: rgba(240,244,249,0.20) !important; }\n[data-theme=\"light\"] .to-\\[\\#05060f\\] { --tw-gradient-to: rgba(240,244,249,1) !important; }\n[data-theme=\"light\"] .bg-\\[\\#05060f\\]\\/70 { background-color: rgba(240,244,249,0.7) !important; }\n\n/* Sjåfør-tema (amber) på lys: bytt cockpit-tekst til varm graphite */\n[data-theme=\"light\"] .text-\\[\\#ffb547\\] { color: #b25a08 !important; }\n[data-theme=\"light\"] .text-\\[\\#1a1206\\] { color: #1a1206 !important; }\n\n/* Demp aurora-blobs i lyst tema slik at de leser som dis, ikke neon */\n[data-theme=\"light\"] .blur-3xl { opacity: 0.35 !important; mix-blend-mode: multiply; }\n\n.dark {\n --background: oklch(0.145 0 0);\n --foreground: oklch(0.985 0 0);\n --card: oklch(0.145 0 0);\n --card-foreground: oklch(0.985 0 0);\n --popover: oklch(0.145 0 0);\n --popover-foreground: oklch(0.985 0 0);\n --primary: oklch(0.985 0 0);\n --primary-foreground: oklch(0.205 0 0);\n --secondary: oklch(0.269 0 0);\n --secondary-foreground: oklch(0.985 0 0);\n --muted: oklch(0.269 0 0);\n --muted-foreground: oklch(0.708 0 0);\n --accent: oklch(0.269 0 0);\n --accent-foreground: oklch(0.985 0 0);\n --destructive: oklch(0.396 0.141 25.723);\n --destructive-foreground: oklch(0.637 0.237 25.331);\n --border: oklch(0.269 0 0);\n --input: oklch(0.269 0 0);\n --ring: oklch(0.439 0 0);\n --font-weight-medium: 500;\n --font-weight-normal: 400;\n --chart-1: oklch(0.488 0.243 264.376);\n --chart-2: oklch(0.696 0.17 162.48);\n --chart-3: oklch(0.769 0.188 70.08);\n --chart-4: oklch(0.627 0.265 303.9);\n --chart-5: oklch(0.645 0.246 16.439);\n --sidebar: oklch(0.205 0 0);\n --sidebar-foreground: oklch(0.985 0 0);\n --sidebar-primary: oklch(0.488 0.243 264.376);\n --sidebar-primary-foreground: oklch(0.985 0 0);\n --sidebar-accent: oklch(0.269 0 0);\n --sidebar-accent-foreground: oklch(0.985 0 0);\n --sidebar-border: oklch(0.269 0 0);\n --sidebar-ring: oklch(0.439 0 0);\n}\n\n@theme inline {\n --color-background: var(--background);\n --color-foreground: var(--foreground);\n --color-card: var(--card);\n --color-card-foreground: var(--card-foreground);\n --color-popover: var(--popover);\n --color-popover-foreground: var(--popover-foreground);\n --color-primary: var(--primary);\n --color-primary-foreground: var(--primary-foreground);\n --color-secondary: var(--secondary);\n --color-secondary-foreground: var(--secondary-foreground);\n --color-muted: var(--muted);\n --color-muted-foreground: var(--muted-foreground);\n --color-accent: var(--accent);\n --color-accent-foreground: var(--accent-foreground);\n --color-destructive: var(--destructive);\n --color-destructive-foreground: var(--destructive-foreground);\n --color-border: var(--border);\n --color-input: var(--input);\n --color-input-background: var(--input-background);\n --color-switch-background: var(--switch-background);\n --color-ring: var(--ring);\n --color-chart-1: var(--chart-1);\n --color-chart-2: var(--chart-2);\n --color-chart-3: var(--chart-3);\n --color-chart-4: var(--chart-4);\n --color-chart-5: var(--chart-5);\n --radius-sm: calc(var(--radius) - 4px);\n --radius-md: calc(var(--radius) - 2px);\n --radius-lg: var(--radius);\n --radius-xl: calc(var(--radius) + 4px);\n --color-sidebar: var(--sidebar);\n --color-sidebar-foreground: var(--sidebar-foreground);\n --color-sidebar-primary: var(--sidebar-primary);\n --color-sidebar-primary-foreground: var(--sidebar-primary-foreground);\n --color-sidebar-accent: var(--sidebar-accent);\n --color-sidebar-accent-foreground: var(--sidebar-accent-foreground);\n --color-sidebar-border: var(--sidebar-border);\n --color-sidebar-ring: var(--sidebar-ring);\n}\n\n@layer base {\n * {\n @apply border-border outline-ring/50;\n }\n\n /* Skjul scrollbars globalt i app-skall — vi har ingen desktop-scrollkontekst.\n Forhindrer Figma/preview-artefakter på iOS, Android og WebKit. */\n *::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none !important; width: 0 !important; height: 0 !important; }\n * { scrollbar-width: none; -ms-overflow-style: none; }\n html, body { scrollbar-width: none; -ms-overflow-style: none; overscroll-behavior: none; overflow: hidden; }\n\n body {\n @apply bg-background text-foreground;\n font-family: var(--font-body);\n }\n\n .font-display { font-family: var(--font-display); }\n .font-mono { font-family: var(--font-mono); }\n\n .aurora-text {\n background: var(--aurora-gradient);\n -webkit-background-clip: text;\n background-clip: text;\n color: transparent;\n }\n\n .glass-panel {\n background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.06), rgba(255,255,255,0.02));\n border: 1px solid var(--glass-border);\n backdrop-filter: blur(24px) saturate(140%);\n -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(24px) saturate(140%);\n }\n\n .holo-border {\n position: relative;\n }\n .holo-border::before {\n content: \"\";\n position: absolute;\n inset: 0;\n border-radius: inherit;\n padding: 1px;\n background: var(--aurora-gradient);\n -webkit-mask: linear-gradient(#000 0 0) content-box, linear-gradient(#000 0 0);\n -webkit-mask-composite: xor;\n mask-composite: exclude;\n pointer-events: none;\n opacity: 0.7;\n }\n\n @keyframes aurora-drift {\n 0%, 100% { transform: translate3d(0,0,0) rotate(0deg) scale(1); }\n 33% { transform: translate3d(4%, -3%, 0) rotate(8deg) scale(1.08); }\n 66% { transform: translate3d(-3%, 4%, 0) rotate(-6deg) scale(1.05); }\n }\n @keyframes shimmer {\n 0% { background-position: -200% 0; }\n 100% { background-position: 200% 0; }\n }\n @keyframes pulse-glow {\n 0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(94, 240, 255, 0.4), 0 0 40px rgba(160, 107, 255, 0.3); }\n 50% { box-shadow: 0 0 32px rgba(94, 240, 255, 0.7), 0 0 64px rgba(160, 107, 255, 0.5); }\n }\n\n /* Tilgjengelighet — respekter prefers-reduced-motion */\n @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {\n *, *::before, *::after {\n animation-duration: 0.001ms !important;\n animation-iteration-count: 1 !important;\n transition-duration: 0.001ms !important;\n }\n }\n\n /* Premium ikon-vekt — tynnere lucide-streker for et mer Apple/Linear-aktig uttrykk */\n svg.lucide {\n stroke-width: 1.6;\n }\n\n /* Synlig fokusring for tastatur-navigasjon */\n :focus-visible {\n outline: 2px solid var(--aurora-cyan);\n outline-offset: 2px;\n border-radius: 6px;\n }\n\n /* Dagslys-modus — ekstra kontrast for skarpt sollys */\n @media (prefers-contrast: more) {\n .glass-panel {\n background: rgba(15, 18, 40, 0.85);\n border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25);\n }\n }\n\n /**\n * Default typography styles for HTML elements (h1-h4, p, label, button, input).\n * These are in @layer base, so Tailwind utility classes (like text-sm, text-lg) automatically override them.\n */\n\n html {\n /* Respekter brukerens innstilte tekststørrelse (iOS Dynamic Type, Android-fontskala) */\n font-size: 100%;\n -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%;\n text-size-adjust: 100%;\n }\n\n h1 {\n font-size: var(--text-2xl);\n font-weight: var(--font-weight-medium);\n line-height: 1.5;\n }\n\n h2 {\n font-size: var(--text-xl);\n font-weight: var(--font-weight-medium);\n line-height: 1.5;\n }\n\n h3 {\n font-size: var(--text-lg);\n font-weight: var(--font-weight-medium);\n line-height: 1.5;\n }\n\n h4 {\n font-size: var(--text-base);\n font-weight: var(--font-weight-medium);\n line-height: 1.5;\n }\n\n label {\n font-size: var(--text-base);\n font-weight: var(--font-weight-medium);\n line-height: 1.5;\n }\n\n button {\n font-size: var(--text-base);\n font-weight: var(--font-weight-medium);\n line-height: 1.5;\n }\n\n input {\n font-size: var(--text-base);\n font-weight: var(--font-weight-normal);\n line-height: 1.5;\n }\n}\n"}, {"path": "src/styles/globals.css", "content": ""}, {"path": "src/styles/tokens.css", "content": "/* Aurora 2.0 — design tokens\n Typography, spacing, radius, glass hierarchy, and motion taxonomy.\n Import from theme.css. */\n\n:root {\n /* Type scale — px sizes paired with line-height + weight */\n --text-display-xl: 28px;\n --text-display-xl-lh: 32px;\n --text-display-lg: 22px;\n --text-display-lg-lh: 28px;\n --text-display-md: 17px;\n --text-display-md-lh: 22px;\n --text-body-lg: 15px;\n --text-body-lg-lh: 22px;\n --text-body: 13px;\n --text-body-lh: 20px;\n --text-body-sm: 11.5px;\n --text-body-sm-lh: 16px;\n --text-mono-md: 11px;\n --text-mono-md-lh: 14px;\n --text-mono-sm: 9.5px;\n --text-mono-sm-lh: 12px;\n --text-mono-xs: 8px;\n --text-mono-xs-lh: 10px;\n\n --tracking-tight: 0.06em;\n --tracking-std: 0.16em;\n --tracking-wide: 0.28em;\n\n /* Spacing scale (4-px grid) */\n --space-1: 4px;\n --space-2: 8px;\n --space-3: 12px;\n --space-4: 16px;\n --space-5: 20px;\n --space-6: 24px;\n --space-7: 32px;\n --space-8: 48px;\n\n /* Radius scale */\n --radius-sm: 8px;\n --radius-md: 12px;\n --radius-lg: 16px;\n --radius-xl: 24px;\n --radius-full: 999px;\n\n /* Glass hierarchy */\n --surface-whisper-bg: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);\n --surface-whisper-border: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);\n --surface-whisper-blur: 12px;\n\n --surface-standard-bg: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);\n --surface-standard-border: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);\n --surface-standard-blur: 16px;\n\n --surface-hero-bg: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);\n --surface-hero-border: rgba(94,240,255,0.22);\n --surface-hero-blur: 24px;\n\n /* Motion taxonomy */\n --ease-snap: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);\n --ease-glide: cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1);\n --motion-loop-slow: 12s;\n --motion-loop-med: 6s;\n --motion-loop-fast: 3s;\n --motion-snap: 220ms;\n --motion-glide: 500ms;\n}\n\n@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {\n :root {\n --motion-loop-slow: 0s;\n --motion-loop-med: 0s;\n --motion-loop-fast: 0s;\n }\n}\n\n/* Utility classes — opt-in, no global override */\n.surface-whisper {\n background: var(--surface-whisper-bg);\n border: 1px solid var(--surface-whisper-border);\n backdrop-filter: blur(var(--surface-whisper-blur));\n -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(var(--surface-whisper-blur));\n}\n.surface-standard {\n background: var(--surface-standard-bg);\n border: 1px solid var(--surface-standard-border);\n backdrop-filter: blur(var(--surface-standard-blur));\n -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(var(--surface-standard-blur));\n}\n.surface-hero {\n background: var(--surface-hero-bg);\n border: 1px solid var(--surface-hero-border);\n backdrop-filter: blur(var(--surface-hero-blur));\n -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(var(--surface-hero-blur));\n box-shadow: 0 16px 48px -16px rgba(94,240,255,0.18);\n}\n\n.tabular { font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }\n"}, {"path": "src/imports/pasted_text/kjapp-login-screen.tsx", "content": "You are a senior mobile UI/UX designer and frontend engineer working on KJAPP, a premium Norwegian AI taxi app.\n\nUse the current selected login/welcome screen as the base. Do NOT redesign the whole screen from scratch. Preserve the premium dark holographic/night atmosphere, the space/glassmorphism background, the mobile layout, and the Norwegian-first identity.\n\nYour task is to polish this screen into a more premium, professional, launch-ready version for KJAPP.\n\nIMPORTANT BRAND DIRECTION:\n- KJAPP is a Norwegian premium AI taxi app.\n- Style: dark premium, holographic cyan/blue/violet, glassmorphism, subtle glow, clean Nordic tech.\n- The screen should feel like a serious Norwegian mobility app, not a gaming app.\n- Keep Vipps as the main recommended login method because this is for Norway.\n- The design must feel trustworthy, premium, simple and modern.\n\nCHANGE THESE SPECIFIC THINGS:\n\n1. Logo / top branding\nReplace the current playful “kj app” text with a more premium KJAPP logo treatment.\nUse:\nKJAPP\nSMART AI TAXI\n\nMake the logo feel more professional, with white/cyan/holographic styling. It should be readable and premium. Do not make it too childish or cartoonish.\n\n2. Greeting text\nReplace “GOD NATT” with a more active Norwegian greeting.\nUse one of these:\n“GOD KVELD, OSLO”\nor\n“REIS SMARTERE I KVELD”\n\nThe text should be small, elegant, spaced out, and premium. Avoid making the app feel like it is sleeping.\n\n3. Vipps main card\nKeep Vipps as the main CTA, but make the orange card slightly more elegant and less visually aggressive.\n- Reduce the height slightly.\n- Keep Vipps orange, but add subtle glassmorphism or a soft holographic border/glow.\n- Text should be:\n“Fortsett med Vipps”\n“Rask og trygg innlogging”\n- Keep the arrow button on the right, but make it more polished and balanced.\n- The Vipps card should still be the strongest CTA, but it should not overpower the entire KJAPP brand.\n\n4. Secondary login buttons\nImprove the BankID, Apple and Google buttons.\n- Make them slightly taller and more readable.\n- Make BankID look more trustworthy and official.\n- Use consistent spacing, equal widths, proper icon alignment and better contrast.\n- Keep them secondary, not stronger than Vipps.\n\n5. Explore without account\nReplace:\n“Utforsk uten konto →”\n\nwith:\n“Se hvordan KJAPP fungerer →”\n\nMake it clear, elegant and trustworthy. This is important for beta users who want to preview the app before creating an account.\n\n6. Driver login\nImprove the bottom driver login button.\nUse:\n“Sjåfør? Logg inn”\n\nMake it slightly more visible, but still secondary. It should feel like a professional driver portal entry, not a small hidden label.\n\n7. Legal footer\nKeep the terms/privacy text, but improve readability slightly.\nUse:\n“Ved å fortsette godtar du vilkår og personvern”\nKeep it small and subtle.\n\n8. Background and atmosphere\nKeep the premium night/cosmic background, but make it more refined:\n- Reduce random star noise slightly.\n- Keep subtle glow and depth.\n- Add a very soft cyan/violet premium light gradient.\n- Avoid too much purple at the bottom.\n- The background should support the UI, not compete with it.\n\n9. Time-based theme system\nCreate a clear design system for automatic theme switching based on time of day:\n- Morning theme: Nordic ice / light cyan / fresh and clean\n- Day theme: premium light mode, white/blue, clean and trustworthy\n- Evening theme: dark navy/cyan, premium glow\n- Night theme: current dark cosmic premium version\n\nThe app should follow the phone system theme by default, but also support KJAPP dynamic mood based on local time.\n\nCreate the theme variables/tokens:\n--background\n--surface\n--surface-glass\n--primary-cyan\n--primary-blue\n--vipps-orange\n--text-primary\n--text-secondary\n--border-glow\n--button-secondary\n--driver-accent\n\n10. Mobile quality\nMake the screen fully mobile-ready:\n- iPhone 14/15 safe-area friendly\n- 100dvh / 100svh layout\n- No overflow\n- CTA visible on all normal mobile screens\n- Balanced vertical spacing\n- Proper touch target sizes\n- All text readable\n- Premium alignment and consistent spacing\n\n11. Component structure\nCreate clean reusable components:\n- KJAPPLogo\n- GreetingHeader\n- VippsLoginCard\n- SecondaryLoginButton\n- ExploreLink\n- DriverLoginButton\n- LegalFooter\n- DynamicBackground\n\n12. Prototype / interaction\nAdd subtle interactions:\n- Vipps card hover/tap glow\n- Secondary button press state\n- Theme transition should be smooth, not sudden\n- Background glow should be subtle and premium\n- Do not add heavy animations that make the app feel slow\n\nFINAL OUTPUT:\nDeliver an improved version of the selected screen.\nDo not create unrelated screens.\nDo not change the product concept.\nDo not remove Vipps.\nDo not make the design generic.\nDo not use emojis.\nDo not use childish icons.\nDo not overuse gradients.\nMake it feel like a premium Norwegian AI taxi app ready for beta launch."}, {"path": "supabase/functions/_shared/cors.ts", "content": "export const corsHeaders = {\n \"Access-Control-Allow-Origin\": \"*\",\n \"Access-Control-Allow-Headers\":\n \"authorization, x-client-info, apikey, content-type, stripe-signature\",\n \"Access-Control-Allow-Methods\": \"POST, GET, OPTIONS\",\n};\n\nexport function handleCors(req: Request): Response | null {\n if (req.method === \"OPTIONS\") {\n return new Response(\"ok\", { headers: corsHeaders });\n }\n return null;\n}\n\nexport function jsonResponse(data: unknown, status = 200): Response {\n return new Response(JSON.stringify(data), {\n status,\n headers: { ...corsHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n });\n}\n"}, {"path": "supabase/functions/_shared/pricing.ts", "content": "// Norway taxi pricing helpers\n// 12% persontransport-MVA included in price; KJAPP keeps 10% platform fee from net.\n\nexport type Tier = \"Eco\" | \"Standard\" | \"Premium\" | \"XL\";\n\nexport const MVA_PERCENT = 12;\nexport const PLATFORM_FEE_PERCENT = 10;\n\nexport function calcFare(opts: {\n baseNok: number;\n perKmNok: number;\n perMinNok: number;\n distanceKm: number;\n durationMin: number;\n surge?: number;\n nightMultiplier?: number;\n weekendMultiplier?: number;\n isNight?: boolean;\n isWeekend?: boolean;\n}): number {\n const base = opts.baseNok;\n const dist = opts.perKmNok * opts.distanceKm;\n const time = opts.perMinNok * opts.durationMin;\n let total = base + dist + time;\n if (opts.isNight && opts.nightMultiplier) total *= opts.nightMultiplier;\n if (opts.isWeekend && opts.weekendMultiplier) total *= opts.weekendMultiplier;\n if (opts.surge) total *= opts.surge;\n return Math.round(total * 100) / 100;\n}\n\nexport function breakdownNok(totalInclMva: number) {\n const net = totalInclMva / (1 + MVA_PERCENT / 100);\n const mva = totalInclMva - net;\n const platformFee = net * (PLATFORM_FEE_PERCENT / 100);\n const driverPayout = net - platformFee;\n return {\n total_incl_mva: round2(totalInclMva),\n net: round2(net),\n mva: round2(mva),\n platform_fee: round2(platformFee),\n driver_payout: round2(driverPayout),\n };\n}\n\nfunction round2(n: number): number {\n return Math.round(n * 100) / 100;\n}\n"}, {"path": "supabase/functions/_shared/supabase.ts", "content": "import { createClient } from \"https://esm.sh/@supabase/supabase-js@2\";\n\nexport function adminClient() {\n return createClient(\n Deno.env.get(\"SUPABASE_URL\")!,\n Deno.env.get(\"SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY\")!,\n { auth: { persistSession: false } },\n );\n}\n\nexport async function authedUserId(req: Request): Promise {\n const auth = req.headers.get(\"Authorization\");\n if (!auth?.startsWith(\"Bearer \")) return null;\n const token = auth.slice(7);\n const client = createClient(\n Deno.env.get(\"SUPABASE_URL\")!,\n Deno.env.get(\"SUPABASE_ANON_KEY\")!,\n { global: { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } } },\n );\n const { data, error } = await client.auth.getUser();\n if (error || !data.user) return null;\n return data.user.id;\n}\n"}, {"path": "supabase/functions/accept-ride/index.ts", "content": "// Driver accepts a ride. Optimistic lock: only succeeds if status='requested'.\n\nimport { handleCors, jsonResponse } from \"../_shared/cors.ts\";\nimport { adminClient, authedUserId } from \"../_shared/supabase.ts\";\n\nDeno.serve(async (req) => {\n const cors = handleCors(req);\n if (cors) return cors;\n\n try {\n const userId = await authedUserId(req);\n if (!userId) return jsonResponse({ error: \"unauthorized\" }, 401);\n\n const { ride_id, vehicle_id } = await req.json();\n if (!ride_id) return jsonResponse({ error: \"ride_id required\" }, 400);\n\n const sb = adminClient();\n\n const { data: driver } = await sb\n .from(\"drivers\")\n .select(\"profile_id, online_status\")\n .eq(\"profile_id\", userId)\n .single();\n if (!driver) return jsonResponse({ error: \"not a driver\" }, 403);\n\n const { data: ride, error } = await sb\n .from(\"rides\")\n .update({\n driver_id: userId,\n vehicle_id: vehicle_id ?? null,\n status: \"accepted\",\n accepted_at: new Date().toISOString(),\n })\n .eq(\"id\", ride_id)\n .eq(\"status\", \"requested\")\n .is(\"driver_id\", null)\n .select()\n .single();\n\n if (error || !ride) {\n return jsonResponse({ error: \"ride already taken\" }, 409);\n }\n\n await sb.from(\"ride_events\").insert({\n ride_id,\n event_type: \"accepted\",\n actor_profile_id: userId,\n });\n\n return jsonResponse({ ride });\n } catch (e) {\n return jsonResponse({ error: (e as Error).message }, 500);\n }\n});\n"}, {"path": "supabase/functions/google-directions/index.ts", "content": "// Google Directions proxy — returns distance_km, duration_min, polyline.\n\nimport { handleCors, jsonResponse } from \"../_shared/cors.ts\";\n\nDeno.serve(async (req) => {\n const cors = handleCors(req);\n if (cors) return cors;\n\n try {\n const { origin, destination } = await req.json();\n const key = Deno.env.get(\"GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY\");\n if (!key) return jsonResponse({ error: \"GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY missing\" }, 500);\n if (!origin || !destination) {\n return jsonResponse({ error: \"origin + destination required\" }, 400);\n }\n\n const o = `${origin.lat},${origin.lng}`;\n const d = `${destination.lat},${destination.lng}`;\n const res = await fetch(\n `https://maps.googleapis.com/maps/api/directions/json?origin=${o}&destination=${d}&mode=driving®ion=no&language=no&key=${key}`,\n );\n const data = await res.json();\n const route = data.routes?.[0];\n const leg = route?.legs?.[0];\n if (!leg) return jsonResponse({ error: \"no route\" }, 404);\n\n return jsonResponse({\n distance_km: leg.distance.value / 1000,\n duration_min: leg.duration.value / 60,\n polyline: route.overview_polyline?.points,\n start_address: leg.start_address,\n end_address: leg.end_address,\n });\n } catch (e) {\n return jsonResponse({ error: (e as Error).message }, 500);\n }\n});\n"}, {"path": "supabase/functions/google-places/index.ts", "content": "// Google Places Autocomplete + Geocoding proxy.\n// Keeps Google API key server-side. Norway-biased.\n\nimport { handleCors, jsonResponse } from \"../_shared/cors.ts\";\n\nDeno.serve(async (req) => {\n const cors = handleCors(req);\n if (cors) return cors;\n\n try {\n const url = new URL(req.url);\n const action = url.searchParams.get(\"action\") ?? \"autocomplete\";\n const key = Deno.env.get(\"GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY\");\n if (!key) return jsonResponse({ error: \"GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY missing\" }, 500);\n\n if (action === \"autocomplete\") {\n const q = url.searchParams.get(\"q\") ?? \"\";\n const sessionToken = url.searchParams.get(\"session\") ?? crypto.randomUUID();\n const res = await fetch(\n `https://maps.googleapis.com/maps/api/place/autocomplete/json?input=${encodeURIComponent(q)}&components=country:no&language=no&sessiontoken=${sessionToken}&key=${key}`,\n );\n const data = await res.json();\n return jsonResponse({\n predictions: (data.predictions ?? []).map((p: { place_id: string; description: string; structured_formatting?: { main_text?: string; secondary_text?: string } }) => ({\n place_id: p.place_id,\n description: p.description,\n main_text: p.structured_formatting?.main_text,\n secondary_text: p.structured_formatting?.secondary_text,\n })),\n session: sessionToken,\n });\n }\n\n if (action === \"details\") {\n const place_id = url.searchParams.get(\"place_id\");\n if (!place_id) return jsonResponse({ error: \"place_id required\" }, 400);\n const res = await fetch(\n `https://maps.googleapis.com/maps/api/place/details/json?place_id=${place_id}&fields=geometry,formatted_address&language=no&key=${key}`,\n );\n const data = await res.json();\n const r = data.result;\n if (!r) return jsonResponse({ error: \"not found\" }, 404);\n return jsonResponse({\n address: r.formatted_address,\n lng: r.geometry?.location?.lng,\n lat: r.geometry?.location?.lat,\n });\n }\n\n return jsonResponse({ error: \"unknown action\" }, 400);\n } catch (e) {\n return jsonResponse({ error: (e as Error).message }, 500);\n }\n});\n"}, {"path": "supabase/functions/openai-aurora-chat/index.ts", "content": "// Aurora AI chat — proxies to OpenAI. Key kept ONLY in edge env, never frontend.\n// MVP scope: chat/voice booking, support, ride status, sjåfør-assist.\n// No Spotify/calendar/history integration in v1.\n\nimport { handleCors, jsonResponse } from \"../_shared/cors.ts\";\nimport { authedUserId } from \"../_shared/supabase.ts\";\n\nconst SYSTEM = `Du er Aurora, KJAPP sin AI-assistent. Du er på norsk (bokmål).\nDu hjelper med taxi-booking, support, ride-status og enkle praktiske svar.\nVær varm, presis, kort. Ikke gjett — spør om nødvendig.\nDu har IKKE tilgang til kalender, Spotify, eller bruker-historikk.\nHvis bruker spør om noe utenfor scope, foreslå å kontakte support.`;\n\ntype Message = { role: \"system\" | \"user\" | \"assistant\"; content: string };\n\nDeno.serve(async (req) => {\n const cors = handleCors(req);\n if (cors) return cors;\n\n try {\n const userId = await authedUserId(req);\n if (!userId) return jsonResponse({ error: \"unauthorized\" }, 401);\n\n const { messages, mode } = (await req.json()) as {\n messages: Message[];\n mode?: \"customer\" | \"driver\";\n };\n\n if (!Array.isArray(messages) || messages.length === 0) {\n return jsonResponse({ error: \"messages required\" }, 400);\n }\n\n const sys = mode === \"driver\"\n ? SYSTEM + \" Du snakker nå med en sjåfør i tjeneste.\"\n : SYSTEM;\n\n const res = await fetch(\"https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions\", {\n method: \"POST\",\n headers: {\n \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n Authorization: `Bearer ${Deno.env.get(\"OPENAI_API_KEY\")}`,\n },\n body: JSON.stringify({\n model: \"gpt-4o-mini\",\n messages: [{ role: \"system\", content: sys }, ...messages.slice(-12)],\n temperature: 0.6,\n max_tokens: 400,\n }),\n });\n\n if (!res.ok) {\n const text = await res.text();\n return jsonResponse({ error: \"openai_error\", detail: text }, 502);\n }\n const data = await res.json();\n const reply = data.choices?.[0]?.message?.content ?? \"\";\n\n return jsonResponse({ reply });\n } catch (e) {\n return jsonResponse({ error: (e as Error).message }, 500);\n }\n});\n"}, {"path": "supabase/functions/request-ride/index.ts", "content": "// Customer requests a ride. Calculates fare from pricing_rules + distance/duration.\n// Inserts rides row + emits ride_events + broadcasts offer to nearby online drivers.\n\nimport { handleCors, jsonResponse } from \"../_shared/cors.ts\";\nimport { adminClient, authedUserId } from \"../_shared/supabase.ts\";\nimport { calcFare, breakdownNok, type Tier } from \"../_shared/pricing.ts\";\n\ntype Body = {\n tier: Tier;\n pickup: { lng: number; lat: number; address: string };\n destination: { lng: number; lat: number; address: string };\n distance_km: number;\n duration_min: number;\n};\n\nDeno.serve(async (req) => {\n const cors = handleCors(req);\n if (cors) return cors;\n\n try {\n const userId = await authedUserId(req);\n if (!userId) return jsonResponse({ error: \"unauthorized\" }, 401);\n\n const body = (await req.json()) as Body;\n const sb = adminClient();\n\n const { data: rule } = await sb\n .from(\"pricing_rules\")\n .select(\"*\")\n .eq(\"tier\", body.tier)\n .lte(\"valid_from\", new Date().toISOString())\n .order(\"valid_from\", { ascending: false })\n .limit(1)\n .single();\n\n if (!rule) return jsonResponse({ error: \"no pricing for tier\" }, 400);\n\n const now = new Date();\n const isNight = now.getHours() < 6 || now.getHours() >= 22;\n const isWeekend = now.getDay() === 0 || now.getDay() === 6;\n\n const fare = calcFare({\n baseNok: Number(rule.base_fare_nok),\n perKmNok: Number(rule.per_km_nok),\n perMinNok: Number(rule.per_min_nok),\n distanceKm: body.distance_km,\n durationMin: body.duration_min,\n nightMultiplier: Number(rule.night_multiplier),\n weekendMultiplier: Number(rule.weekend_multiplier),\n isNight,\n isWeekend,\n });\n\n const b = breakdownNok(fare);\n\n const { data: ride, error } = await sb.from(\"rides\").insert({\n customer_id: userId,\n tier: body.tier,\n status: \"requested\",\n pickup_lng: body.pickup.lng,\n pickup_lat: body.pickup.lat,\n pickup_address: body.pickup.address,\n destination_lng: body.destination.lng,\n destination_lat: body.destination.lat,\n destination_address: body.destination.address,\n estimated_fare_nok: fare,\n distance_km: body.distance_km,\n duration_min: body.duration_min,\n mva_amount_nok: b.mva,\n platform_fee_nok: b.platform_fee,\n driver_payout_nok: b.driver_payout,\n }).select().single();\n\n if (error) return jsonResponse({ error: error.message }, 500);\n\n await sb.from(\"ride_events\").insert({\n ride_id: ride.id,\n event_type: \"requested\",\n actor_profile_id: userId,\n payload: { tier: body.tier, fare_nok: fare },\n });\n\n return jsonResponse({ ride, breakdown: b });\n } catch (e) {\n return jsonResponse({ error: (e as Error).message }, 500);\n }\n});\n"}, {"path": "supabase/functions/stripe-create-intent/index.ts", "content": "// Creates a Stripe PaymentIntent for a ride. Returns client_secret for PaymentSheet.\n// 10% KJAPP platform fee + 12% MVA breakdown stored on payments row.\n\nimport Stripe from \"https://esm.sh/stripe@14?target=deno\";\nimport { handleCors, jsonResponse } from \"../_shared/cors.ts\";\nimport { adminClient, authedUserId } from \"../_shared/supabase.ts\";\nimport { breakdownNok } from \"../_shared/pricing.ts\";\n\nDeno.serve(async (req) => {\n const cors = handleCors(req);\n if (cors) return cors;\n\n try {\n const userId = await authedUserId(req);\n if (!userId) return jsonResponse({ error: \"unauthorized\" }, 401);\n\n const { ride_id } = await req.json();\n if (!ride_id) return jsonResponse({ error: \"ride_id required\" }, 400);\n\n const sb = adminClient();\n const { data: ride, error } = await sb\n .from(\"rides\")\n .select(\"*\")\n .eq(\"id\", ride_id)\n .eq(\"customer_id\", userId)\n .single();\n if (error || !ride) return jsonResponse({ error: \"ride not found\" }, 404);\n\n const totalNok = Number(ride.final_fare_nok ?? ride.estimated_fare_nok);\n if (!totalNok || totalNok <= 0) {\n return jsonResponse({ error: \"ride has no fare\" }, 400);\n }\n\n const b = breakdownNok(totalNok);\n const amountOre = Math.round(totalNok * 100);\n\n const stripe = new Stripe(Deno.env.get(\"STRIPE_SECRET_KEY\")!, {\n apiVersion: \"2024-11-20.acacia\",\n httpClient: Stripe.createFetchHttpClient(),\n });\n\n const intent = await stripe.paymentIntents.create({\n amount: amountOre,\n currency: \"nok\",\n automatic_payment_methods: { enabled: true },\n metadata: {\n ride_id: ride.id,\n customer_id: userId,\n platform_fee_nok: String(b.platform_fee),\n mva_nok: String(b.mva),\n },\n });\n\n await sb.from(\"payments\").upsert(\n {\n ride_id: ride.id,\n profile_id: userId,\n provider: \"stripe\",\n stripe_payment_intent_id: intent.id,\n amount_nok: b.total_incl_mva,\n platform_fee_nok: b.platform_fee,\n driver_payout_nok: b.driver_payout,\n mva_amount_nok: b.mva,\n currency: \"NOK\",\n status: \"pending\",\n },\n { onConflict: \"ride_id\" },\n );\n\n return jsonResponse({\n client_secret: intent.client_secret,\n payment_intent_id: intent.id,\n breakdown: b,\n });\n } catch (e) {\n console.error(e);\n return jsonResponse({ error: (e as Error).message }, 500);\n }\n});\n"}, {"path": "supabase/functions/stripe-webhook/index.ts", "content": "// Stripe webhook → updates payments + ride status on successful capture.\n// Configure endpoint in Stripe Dashboard. Secret in env STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET.\n\nimport Stripe from \"https://esm.sh/stripe@14?target=deno\";\nimport { adminClient } from \"../_shared/supabase.ts\";\n\nconst stripe = new Stripe(Deno.env.get(\"STRIPE_SECRET_KEY\")!, {\n apiVersion: \"2024-11-20.acacia\",\n httpClient: Stripe.createFetchHttpClient(),\n});\n\nDeno.serve(async (req) => {\n const sig = req.headers.get(\"stripe-signature\");\n const body = await req.text();\n if (!sig) return new Response(\"missing signature\", { status: 400 });\n\n let event: Stripe.Event;\n try {\n event = await stripe.webhooks.constructEventAsync(\n body,\n sig,\n Deno.env.get(\"STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET\")!,\n undefined,\n Stripe.createSubtleCryptoProvider(),\n );\n } catch (err) {\n return new Response(`signature: ${(err as Error).message}`, { status: 400 });\n }\n\n const sb = adminClient();\n\n switch (event.type) {\n case \"payment_intent.succeeded\": {\n const pi = event.data.object as Stripe.PaymentIntent;\n const rideId = pi.metadata?.ride_id;\n await sb.from(\"payments\").update({\n status: \"captured\",\n captured_at: new Date().toISOString(),\n stripe_charge_id: pi.latest_charge as string,\n raw_response: pi as unknown as Record,\n }).eq(\"stripe_payment_intent_id\", pi.id);\n if (rideId) {\n await sb.from(\"rides\").update({ status: \"completed\" }).eq(\"id\", rideId);\n await sb.from(\"ride_events\").insert({\n ride_id: rideId,\n event_type: \"payment_captured\",\n payload: { payment_intent_id: pi.id, amount_nok: pi.amount / 100 },\n });\n }\n break;\n }\n case \"payment_intent.payment_failed\": {\n const pi = event.data.object as Stripe.PaymentIntent;\n await sb.from(\"payments\").update({\n status: \"failed\",\n raw_response: pi as unknown as Record,\n }).eq(\"stripe_payment_intent_id\", pi.id);\n break;\n }\n case \"charge.refunded\": {\n const ch = event.data.object as Stripe.Charge;\n await sb.from(\"payments\").update({\n status: \"refunded\",\n refunded_at: new Date().toISOString(),\n }).eq(\"stripe_charge_id\", ch.id);\n break;\n }\n }\n\n return new Response(\"ok\", { status: 200 });\n});\n"}, {"path": "supabase/functions/update-ride-status/index.ts", "content": "// Driver progresses ride: driver_arrived → in_progress → completed.\n// On completed: finalizes fare, freezes breakdown. Stripe capture triggered separately.\n\nimport { handleCors, jsonResponse } from \"../_shared/cors.ts\";\nimport { adminClient, authedUserId } from \"../_shared/supabase.ts\";\nimport { breakdownNok } from \"../_shared/pricing.ts\";\n\nconst ALLOWED = [\"driver_arrived\", \"in_progress\", \"completed\", \"cancelled\"] as const;\n\nDeno.serve(async (req) => {\n const cors = handleCors(req);\n if (cors) return cors;\n\n try {\n const userId = await authedUserId(req);\n if (!userId) return jsonResponse({ error: \"unauthorized\" }, 401);\n\n const { ride_id, status, final_fare_nok, cancel_reason } = await req.json();\n if (!ride_id || !ALLOWED.includes(status)) {\n return jsonResponse({ error: \"invalid status\" }, 400);\n }\n\n const sb = adminClient();\n const { data: ride } = await sb.from(\"rides\").select(\"*\").eq(\"id\", ride_id).single();\n if (!ride) return jsonResponse({ error: \"not found\" }, 404);\n if (ride.driver_id !== userId && ride.customer_id !== userId) {\n return jsonResponse({ error: \"forbidden\" }, 403);\n }\n\n const patch: Record = { status };\n const nowIso = new Date().toISOString();\n if (status === \"driver_arrived\") patch.driver_arrived_at = nowIso;\n if (status === \"in_progress\") patch.picked_up_at = nowIso;\n if (status === \"cancelled\") {\n patch.cancelled_at = nowIso;\n patch.cancel_reason = cancel_reason ?? null;\n }\n if (status === \"completed\") {\n patch.completed_at = nowIso;\n const fare = Number(final_fare_nok ?? ride.estimated_fare_nok);\n patch.final_fare_nok = fare;\n const b = breakdownNok(fare);\n patch.mva_amount_nok = b.mva;\n patch.platform_fee_nok = b.platform_fee;\n patch.driver_payout_nok = b.driver_payout;\n }\n\n const { data: updated, error } = await sb\n .from(\"rides\")\n .update(patch)\n .eq(\"id\", ride_id)\n .select()\n .single();\n if (error) return jsonResponse({ error: error.message }, 500);\n\n await sb.from(\"ride_events\").insert({\n ride_id,\n event_type: status,\n actor_profile_id: userId,\n payload: { final_fare_nok: patch.final_fare_nok ?? null },\n });\n\n return jsonResponse({ ride: updated });\n } catch (e) {\n return jsonResponse({ error: (e as Error).message }, 500);\n }\n});\n"}, {"path": "supabase/functions/server/kv_store.tsx", "content": "/* AUTOGENERATED FILE - DO NOT EDIT CONTENTS */\n\n/* Table schema:\nCREATE TABLE kv_store_371148df (\n key TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,\n value JSONB NOT NULL\n);\n*/\n\n// View at https://supabase.com/dashboard/project/fjaohfebbidrsitqitbm/database/tables\n\n// This file provides a simple key-value interface for storing Figma Make data. It should be adequate for most small-scale use cases.\nimport { createClient } from \"jsr:@supabase/supabase-js@2.49.8\";\n\nconst client = () => createClient(\n Deno.env.get(\"SUPABASE_URL\"),\n Deno.env.get(\"SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY\"),\n);\n\n// Set stores a key-value pair in the database.\nexport const set = async (key: string, value: any): Promise => {\n const supabase = client()\n const { error } = await supabase.from(\"kv_store_371148df\").upsert({\n key,\n value\n });\n if (error) {\n throw new Error(error.message);\n }\n};\n\n// Get retrieves a key-value pair from the database.\nexport const get = async (key: string): Promise => {\n const supabase = client()\n const { data, error } = await supabase.from(\"kv_store_371148df\").select(\"value\").eq(\"key\", key).maybeSingle();\n if (error) {\n throw new Error(error.message);\n }\n return data?.value;\n};\n\n// Delete deletes a key-value pair from the database.\nexport const del = async (key: string): Promise => {\n const supabase = client()\n const { error } = await supabase.from(\"kv_store_371148df\").delete().eq(\"key\", key);\n if (error) {\n throw new Error(error.message);\n }\n};\n\n// Sets multiple key-value pairs in the database.\nexport const mset = async (keys: string[], values: any[]): Promise => {\n const supabase = client()\n const { error } = await supabase.from(\"kv_store_371148df\").upsert(keys.map((k, i) => ({ key: k, value: values[i] })));\n if (error) {\n throw new Error(error.message);\n }\n};\n\n// Gets multiple key-value pairs from the database.\nexport const mget = async (keys: string[]): Promise => {\n const supabase = client()\n const { data, error } = await supabase.from(\"kv_store_371148df\").select(\"value\").in(\"key\", keys);\n if (error) {\n throw new Error(error.message);\n }\n return data?.map((d) => d.value) ?? [];\n};\n\n// Deletes multiple key-value pairs from the database.\nexport const mdel = async (keys: string[]): Promise => {\n const supabase = client()\n const { error } = await supabase.from(\"kv_store_371148df\").delete().in(\"key\", keys);\n if (error) {\n throw new Error(error.message);\n }\n};\n\n// Search for key-value pairs by prefix.\nexport const getByPrefix = async (prefix: string): Promise => {\n const supabase = client()\n const { data, error } = await supabase.from(\"kv_store_371148df\").select(\"key, value\").like(\"key\", prefix + \"%\");\n if (error) {\n throw new Error(error.message);\n }\n return data?.map((d) => d.value) ?? [];\n};"}, {"path": "supabase/functions/server/index.tsx", "content": "import { Hono } from \"npm:hono\";\nimport { cors } from \"npm:hono/cors\";\nimport { logger } from \"npm:hono/logger\";\nimport * as kv from \"./kv_store.tsx\";\n\nconst app = new Hono();\napp.use(\"*\", logger(console.log));\napp.use(\n \"/*\",\n cors({\n origin: \"*\",\n allowHeaders: [\"Content-Type\", \"Authorization\"],\n allowMethods: [\"GET\", \"POST\", \"PUT\", \"DELETE\", \"OPTIONS\"],\n exposeHeaders: [\"Content-Length\"],\n maxAge: 600,\n }),\n);\n\nconst BASE = \"/make-server-371148df\";\n\napp.get(`${BASE}/health`, (c) => c.json({ status: \"ok\" }));\n\n// ─── Google Maps proxy ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n// Server-side only. Key never leaves edge runtime.\n// Restrict in Google Cloud Console: HTTP referrer is N/A here, instead restrict\n// to IP if static, or rely on Supabase JWT validation (which Hono runs by default).\n\nconst GMAPS_KEY = Deno.env.get(\"GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY\") ?? \"\";\n\napp.get(`${BASE}/maps/places-autocomplete`, async (c) => {\n const q = c.req.query(\"q\") ?? \"\";\n if (!q.trim()) return c.json({ predictions: [] });\n if (!GMAPS_KEY) {\n console.log(\"GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY not set — returning empty predictions\");\n return c.json({ predictions: [], stub: true });\n }\n try {\n const url = new URL(\"https://maps.googleapis.com/maps/api/place/autocomplete/json\");\n url.searchParams.set(\"input\", q);\n url.searchParams.set(\"language\", \"no\");\n url.searchParams.set(\"region\", \"no\");\n url.searchParams.set(\"components\", \"country:no\");\n url.searchParams.set(\"key\", GMAPS_KEY);\n const r = await fetch(url.toString());\n const data = await r.json();\n return c.json({\n predictions: (data.predictions ?? []).map((p: any) => ({\n place_id: p.place_id,\n description: p.description,\n main_text: p.structured_formatting?.main_text,\n secondary_text: p.structured_formatting?.secondary_text,\n })),\n });\n } catch (e) {\n console.log(\"places-autocomplete error:\", e);\n return c.json({ error: String(e) }, 500);\n }\n});\n\napp.get(`${BASE}/maps/places-details`, async (c) => {\n const placeId = c.req.query(\"place_id\") ?? \"\";\n if (!placeId) return c.json({ error: \"place_id required\" }, 400);\n if (!GMAPS_KEY) {\n return c.json({\n place_id: placeId,\n formatted_address: \"Stub-adresse (sett GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY)\",\n lat: 59.9139,\n lng: 10.7522,\n stub: true,\n });\n }\n try {\n const url = new URL(\"https://maps.googleapis.com/maps/api/place/details/json\");\n url.searchParams.set(\"place_id\", placeId);\n url.searchParams.set(\"language\", \"no\");\n url.searchParams.set(\"fields\", \"place_id,formatted_address,geometry,name\");\n url.searchParams.set(\"key\", GMAPS_KEY);\n const r = await fetch(url.toString());\n const data = await r.json();\n const res = data.result ?? {};\n return c.json({\n place_id: res.place_id,\n name: res.name,\n formatted_address: res.formatted_address,\n lat: res.geometry?.location?.lat,\n lng: res.geometry?.location?.lng,\n });\n } catch (e) {\n console.log(\"places-details error:\", e);\n return c.json({ error: String(e) }, 500);\n }\n});\n\napp.post(`${BASE}/maps/directions`, async (c) => {\n const body = await c.req.json().catch(() => ({}));\n const { origin, destination } = body as {\n origin?: { lat: number; lng: number };\n destination?: { lat: number; lng: number };\n };\n if (!origin || !destination) {\n return c.json({ error: \"origin og destination kreves\" }, 400);\n }\n if (!GMAPS_KEY) {\n return c.json({\n distance_km: 4.2,\n duration_min: 12,\n polyline: \"\",\n stub: true,\n });\n }\n try {\n const url = new URL(\"https://maps.googleapis.com/maps/api/directions/json\");\n url.searchParams.set(\"origin\", `${origin.lat},${origin.lng}`);\n url.searchParams.set(\"destination\", `${destination.lat},${destination.lng}`);\n url.searchParams.set(\"language\", \"no\");\n url.searchParams.set(\"region\", \"no\");\n url.searchParams.set(\"mode\", \"driving\");\n url.searchParams.set(\"key\", GMAPS_KEY);\n const r = await fetch(url.toString());\n const data = await r.json();\n const leg = data.routes?.[0]?.legs?.[0];\n return c.json({\n distance_km: leg ? leg.distance.value / 1000 : null,\n duration_min: leg ? Math.round(leg.duration.value / 60) : null,\n polyline: data.routes?.[0]?.overview_polyline?.points ?? \"\",\n });\n } catch (e) {\n console.log(\"directions error:\", e);\n return c.json({ error: String(e) }, 500);\n }\n});\n\n// ─── Recent destinations (KV) ──────────────────────────────────────────────\n// Saved per user; used to populate recent suggestions in BookRide.\n\napp.post(`${BASE}/places/recent`, async (c) => {\n const userId = c.req.header(\"x-user-id\");\n if (!userId) return c.json({ error: \"missing user\" }, 401);\n const body = await c.req.json().catch(() => ({}));\n const { place_id, label, address, lat, lng } = body;\n if (!place_id) return c.json({ error: \"place_id required\" }, 400);\n const key = `recent:${userId}`;\n const existing = (await kv.get(key)) ?? [];\n const filtered = (existing as any[]).filter((p) => p.place_id !== place_id);\n const next = [{ place_id, label, address, lat, lng, at: Date.now() }, ...filtered].slice(0, 8);\n await kv.set(key, next);\n return c.json({ ok: true });\n});\n\napp.get(`${BASE}/places/recent`, async (c) => {\n const userId = c.req.header(\"x-user-id\");\n if (!userId) return c.json({ recent: [] });\n const recent = (await kv.get(`recent:${userId}`)) ?? [];\n return c.json({ recent });\n});\n\n// ─── Rides (KV-mode prototype) ─────────────────────────────────────────────\n// Pseudo-realtime via polling — driver app polls /rides/offers every 4-5s.\n// Storage shape:\n// ride:{id} → full ride object\n// driver-offers:{driverId} → array of ride IDs waiting for driver\n// user-rides:{userId} → array of ride IDs (customer OR driver)\n\nconst TIERS: Record = {\n Eco: { base: 49, perKm: 12, perMin: 3 },\n Standard: { base: 65, perKm: 15, perMin: 4 },\n Premium: { base: 95, perKm: 22, perMin: 5 },\n XL: { base: 110, perKm: 24, perMin: 5 },\n};\n\nfunction priceBreakdown(totalInclMva: number) {\n const net = +(totalInclMva / 1.12).toFixed(2);\n const mva = +(totalInclMva - net).toFixed(2);\n const platform_fee = +(net * 0.1).toFixed(2);\n const driver_payout = +(net - platform_fee).toFixed(2);\n return { total: totalInclMva, net, mva, platform_fee, driver_payout };\n}\n\nfunction newId() {\n return `r_${Date.now().toString(36)}${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}`;\n}\n\nasync function pushToUserRides(userId: string, rideId: string) {\n const key = `user-rides:${userId}`;\n const list = ((await kv.get(key)) as string[] | null) ?? [];\n if (!list.includes(rideId)) {\n list.unshift(rideId);\n await kv.set(key, list.slice(0, 50));\n }\n}\n\napp.post(`${BASE}/rides/request`, async (c) => {\n const userId = c.req.header(\"x-user-id\");\n if (!userId) return c.json({ error: \"missing user\" }, 401);\n const body = await c.req.json().catch(() => ({}));\n const {\n tier = \"Standard\",\n pickup,\n destination,\n distance_km = 4.2,\n duration_min = 12,\n note,\n } = body;\n if (!pickup?.address || !destination?.address) {\n return c.json({ error: \"pickup og destination kreves\" }, 400);\n }\n const t = TIERS[tier] ?? TIERS.Standard;\n const total = Math.round(t.base + t.perKm * distance_km + t.perMin * duration_min);\n const ride = {\n id: newId(),\n customer_id: userId,\n driver_id: null as string | null,\n tier,\n pickup,\n destination,\n distance_km,\n duration_min,\n note: note ?? null,\n status: \"requested\" as\n | \"requested\"\n | \"accepted\"\n | \"driver_arrived\"\n | \"in_progress\"\n | \"completed\"\n | \"cancelled\",\n fare: priceBreakdown(total),\n requested_at: Date.now(),\n accepted_at: null as number | null,\n completed_at: null as number | null,\n };\n await kv.set(`ride:${ride.id}`, ride);\n await pushToUserRides(userId, ride.id);\n\n // Broadcast to all online drivers by adding to a global pending list.\n // Drivers poll this list and self-filter by proximity in real prod.\n const pending = ((await kv.get(\"rides:pending\")) as string[] | null) ?? [];\n pending.unshift(ride.id);\n await kv.set(\"rides:pending\", pending.slice(0, 200));\n\n return c.json({ ride });\n});\n\napp.get(`${BASE}/rides/offers`, async (c) => {\n // Driver polls this. Returns rides with status=requested that are still unclaimed.\n const pending = ((await kv.get(\"rides:pending\")) as string[] | null) ?? [];\n const out: any[] = [];\n for (const id of pending.slice(0, 10)) {\n const ride = (await kv.get(`ride:${id}`)) as any;\n if (ride && ride.status === \"requested\" && !ride.driver_id) {\n out.push(ride);\n }\n }\n return c.json({ offers: out });\n});\n\napp.post(`${BASE}/rides/accept`, async (c) => {\n const userId = c.req.header(\"x-user-id\");\n if (!userId) return c.json({ error: \"missing user\" }, 401);\n const { ride_id } = await c.req.json().catch(() => ({}));\n if (!ride_id) return c.json({ error: \"ride_id required\" }, 400);\n const ride = (await kv.get(`ride:${ride_id}`)) as any;\n if (!ride) return c.json({ error: \"ride not found\" }, 404);\n // Optimistic check — first writer wins\n if (ride.driver_id || ride.status !== \"requested\") {\n return c.json({ error: \"ride allerede tatt\" }, 409);\n }\n ride.driver_id = userId;\n ride.status = \"accepted\";\n ride.accepted_at = Date.now();\n await kv.set(`ride:${ride.id}`, ride);\n await pushToUserRides(userId, ride.id);\n // Drop from pending list\n const pending = ((await kv.get(\"rides:pending\")) as string[] | null) ?? [];\n await kv.set(\"rides:pending\", pending.filter((id) => id !== ride.id));\n return c.json({ ride });\n});\n\napp.post(`${BASE}/rides/status`, async (c) => {\n const userId = c.req.header(\"x-user-id\");\n if (!userId) return c.json({ error: \"missing user\" }, 401);\n const { ride_id, status, cancel_reason } = await c.req.json().catch(() => ({}));\n const valid = [\"driver_arrived\", \"in_progress\", \"completed\", \"cancelled\"];\n if (!ride_id || !valid.includes(status)) {\n return c.json({ error: \"ride_id og gyldig status kreves\" }, 400);\n }\n const ride = (await kv.get(`ride:${ride_id}`)) as any;\n if (!ride) return c.json({ error: \"ride not found\" }, 404);\n if (ride.customer_id !== userId && ride.driver_id !== userId) {\n return c.json({ error: \"ikke din tur\" }, 403);\n }\n ride.status = status;\n if (status === \"completed\") ride.completed_at = Date.now();\n if (status === \"cancelled\") ride.cancel_reason = cancel_reason ?? null;\n await kv.set(`ride:${ride.id}`, ride);\n return c.json({ ride });\n});\n\napp.get(`${BASE}/rides/:id`, async (c) => {\n const ride = (await kv.get(`ride:${c.req.param(\"id\")}`)) as any;\n if (!ride) return c.json({ error: \"not found\" }, 404);\n return c.json({ ride });\n});\n\napp.get(`${BASE}/rides/mine/list`, async (c) => {\n const userId = c.req.header(\"x-user-id\");\n if (!userId) return c.json({ rides: [] });\n const ids = ((await kv.get(`user-rides:${userId}`)) as string[] | null) ?? [];\n const rides: any[] = [];\n for (const id of ids.slice(0, 20)) {\n const ride = (await kv.get(`ride:${id}`)) as any;\n if (ride) rides.push(ride);\n }\n return c.json({ rides });\n});\n\n// ─── GDPR + samtykke ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n// Norsk personvernlov (GDPR art. 7, 15, 17). Versjonsstyrt samtykke gir audit trail.\n\nconst CURRENT_CONSENT_VERSION = \"2026-06-07\";\n\napp.post(`${BASE}/consent/log`, async (c) => {\n const userId = c.req.header(\"x-user-id\");\n if (!userId) return c.json({ error: \"missing user\" }, 401);\n const body = await c.req.json().catch(() => ({}));\n const { consents } = body as {\n consents?: { type: string; granted: boolean; version?: string }[];\n };\n if (!Array.isArray(consents)) {\n return c.json({ error: \"consents kreves\" }, 400);\n }\n const key = `consent:${userId}`;\n const existing = ((await kv.get(key)) as any[] | null) ?? [];\n const ts = Date.now();\n const ua = c.req.header(\"user-agent\") ?? null;\n const entries = consents.map((cnt) => ({\n type: cnt.type,\n granted: cnt.granted,\n version: cnt.version ?? CURRENT_CONSENT_VERSION,\n at: ts,\n user_agent: ua,\n }));\n await kv.set(key, [...existing, ...entries].slice(-100));\n return c.json({ ok: true, logged: entries.length });\n});\n\napp.get(`${BASE}/consent/status`, async (c) => {\n const userId = c.req.header(\"x-user-id\");\n if (!userId) return c.json({ accepted: false });\n const log = ((await kv.get(`consent:${userId}`)) as any[] | null) ?? [];\n // Latest GDPR-grant for current version\n const latest = log\n .filter((e) => e.type === \"gdpr\" && e.version === CURRENT_CONSENT_VERSION)\n .pop();\n return c.json({\n accepted: Boolean(latest?.granted),\n version: CURRENT_CONSENT_VERSION,\n at: latest?.at ?? null,\n });\n});\n\napp.get(`${BASE}/gdpr/export`, async (c) => {\n // Returns ALL personal data held about the calling user (GDPR art. 15)\n const userId = c.req.header(\"x-user-id\");\n if (!userId) return c.json({ error: \"missing user\" }, 401);\n\n const profile = await kv.get(`profile:${userId}`);\n const consent_log = (await kv.get(`consent:${userId}`)) ?? [];\n const recent_places = (await kv.get(`recent:${userId}`)) ?? [];\n const ride_ids = ((await kv.get(`user-rides:${userId}`)) as string[] | null) ?? [];\n const rides: any[] = [];\n for (const id of ride_ids) {\n const r = await kv.get(`ride:${id}`);\n if (r) rides.push(r);\n }\n const messages = (await kv.get(`messages:${userId}`)) ?? [];\n\n return c.json({\n export_version: \"1.0\",\n generated_at: new Date().toISOString(),\n user_id: userId,\n profile,\n consent_log,\n recent_places,\n rides,\n messages,\n _note:\n \"Dette er all personlig data KJAPP har om deg. \" +\n \"Lagring av rides etter sletting er regnskaps-pliktig (Bokføringsloven §10, 5 år), \" +\n \"men da anonymisert.\",\n });\n});\n\napp.post(`${BASE}/gdpr/delete`, async (c) => {\n // Soft-delete with 30-day grace (GDPR art. 17 right to erasure).\n // Payment methods + driver documents hard-deleted immediately.\n // Rides + payments anonymized but retained 5 years (Bokføringsloven).\n const userId = c.req.header(\"x-user-id\");\n if (!userId) return c.json({ error: \"missing user\" }, 401);\n\n const now = Date.now();\n const graceEndsAt = now + 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000;\n\n // 1. Mark profile soft-deleted\n const profile = ((await kv.get(`profile:${userId}`)) as any) ?? {};\n await kv.set(`profile:${userId}`, {\n ...profile,\n deleted_at: now,\n hard_delete_at: graceEndsAt,\n });\n\n // 2. Hard-delete payment tokens immediately\n await kv.del(`payment-methods:${userId}`);\n\n // 3. Hard-delete recent places + messages (no legal retention requirement)\n await kv.del(`recent:${userId}`);\n await kv.del(`messages:${userId}`);\n\n // 4. Anonymize rides (keep for accounting)\n const ride_ids = ((await kv.get(`user-rides:${userId}`)) as string[] | null) ?? [];\n for (const id of ride_ids) {\n const ride = (await kv.get(`ride:${id}`)) as any;\n if (!ride) continue;\n if (ride.customer_id === userId) {\n ride.customer_id = \"[anonymized]\";\n ride.pickup = { address: \"[anonymized]\", lat: 0, lng: 0 };\n ride.destination = { address: \"[anonymized]\", lat: 0, lng: 0 };\n }\n if (ride.driver_id === userId) ride.driver_id = \"[anonymized]\";\n ride.anonymized_at = now;\n await kv.set(`ride:${id}`, ride);\n }\n await kv.del(`user-rides:${userId}`);\n\n // 5. Log the deletion request itself (audit trail)\n const auditKey = `audit:deletions`;\n const audit = ((await kv.get(auditKey)) as any[] | null) ?? [];\n audit.unshift({ user_id: userId, requested_at: now, hard_delete_at: graceEndsAt });\n await kv.set(auditKey, audit.slice(0, 1000));\n\n return c.json({\n ok: true,\n soft_deleted_at: now,\n hard_delete_at: graceEndsAt,\n grace_days: 30,\n });\n});\n\nDeno.serve(app.fetch);\n"}, {"path": "supabase/migrations/0001_init_auth_profiles.sql", "content": "-- KJAPP — init: profiles, roles, consent log, user settings, saved places\n-- Norway pilot. Owner: NexoraHub AS (orgnr 914 827 442)\n\ncreate extension if not exists \"pgcrypto\";\n\n-- Roles enum\ndo $$ begin\n create type user_role as enum ('customer', 'driver', 'fleet_owner', 'super_admin');\nexception when duplicate_object then null; end $$;\n\n-- Profiles — extends auth.users 1:1\ncreate table if not exists public.profiles (\n id uuid primary key references auth.users(id) on delete cascade,\n role user_role not null default 'customer',\n full_name text,\n phone text unique,\n email text,\n language text not null default 'no',\n created_at timestamptz not null default now(),\n updated_at timestamptz not null default now(),\n deleted_at timestamptz\n);\n\ncreate index if not exists profiles_role_idx on public.profiles(role) where deleted_at is null;\n\n-- Consent log — GDPR audit trail (append-only conceptually)\ncreate table if not exists public.consent_log (\n id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),\n profile_id uuid not null references public.profiles(id) on delete cascade,\n consent_type text not null,\n version text not null,\n granted_at timestamptz not null default now(),\n withdrawn_at timestamptz,\n ip inet,\n user_agent text\n);\n\ncreate index if not exists consent_log_profile_idx on public.consent_log(profile_id);\n\n-- User settings (1:1 with profile)\ncreate table if not exists public.user_settings (\n profile_id uuid primary key references public.profiles(id) on delete cascade,\n theme text not null default 'aurora',\n notifications_push boolean not null default true,\n notifications_email boolean not null default false,\n marketing_opt_in boolean not null default false,\n default_payment_method_id uuid,\n receipts_email text,\n updated_at timestamptz not null default now()\n);\n\n-- Saved places\ncreate table if not exists public.saved_places (\n id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),\n profile_id uuid not null references public.profiles(id) on delete cascade,\n label text not null,\n address text not null,\n lng double precision not null,\n lat double precision not null,\n icon text,\n sort_order int not null default 0,\n created_at timestamptz not null default now()\n);\n\ncreate index if not exists saved_places_profile_idx on public.saved_places(profile_id);\n\n-- Auto-create profile on signup\ncreate or replace function public.handle_new_user()\nreturns trigger\nlanguage plpgsql\nsecurity definer set search_path = public\nas $$\nbegin\n insert into public.profiles (id, phone, email)\n values (new.id, new.phone, new.email)\n on conflict (id) do nothing;\n\n insert into public.user_settings (profile_id)\n values (new.id)\n on conflict (profile_id) do nothing;\n\n return new;\nend;\n$$;\n\ndrop trigger if exists on_auth_user_created on auth.users;\ncreate trigger on_auth_user_created\n after insert on auth.users\n for each row execute procedure public.handle_new_user();\n\n-- RLS\nalter table public.profiles enable row level security;\nalter table public.consent_log enable row level security;\nalter table public.user_settings enable row level security;\nalter table public.saved_places enable row level security;\n\ncreate policy \"own profile readable\" on public.profiles\n for select using (auth.uid() = id);\ncreate policy \"own profile updatable\" on public.profiles\n for update using (auth.uid() = id);\n\ncreate policy \"own consent readable\" on public.consent_log\n for select using (auth.uid() = profile_id);\ncreate policy \"own consent insertable\" on public.consent_log\n for insert with check (auth.uid() = profile_id);\n\ncreate policy \"own settings rw\" on public.user_settings\n for all using (auth.uid() = profile_id) with check (auth.uid() = profile_id);\n\ncreate policy \"own places rw\" on public.saved_places\n for all using (auth.uid() = profile_id) with check (auth.uid() = profile_id);\n"}, {"path": "supabase/migrations/0002_fleets_drivers_vehicles.sql", "content": "-- Fleets (løyvehaver companies), drivers, vehicles, driver locations & sessions\n\ndo $$ begin\n create type online_status as enum ('online', 'offline', 'busy');\nexception when duplicate_object then null; end $$;\n\ndo $$ begin\n create type vehicle_tier as enum ('Eco', 'Standard', 'Premium', 'XL');\nexception when duplicate_object then null; end $$;\n\n-- Fleets (løyvehaver)\ncreate table if not exists public.fleets (\n id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),\n owner_profile_id uuid not null references public.profiles(id) on delete restrict,\n name text not null,\n orgnr text unique not null,\n contact_phone text,\n contact_email text,\n address text,\n payout_iban text,\n payout_account_holder text,\n firmaattest_url text,\n firmaattest_valid_until date,\n approved_at timestamptz,\n approved_by_profile_id uuid references public.profiles(id),\n created_at timestamptz not null default now()\n);\n\ncreate index if not exists fleets_owner_idx on public.fleets(owner_profile_id);\n\n-- Vehicles\ncreate table if not exists public.vehicles (\n id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),\n fleet_id uuid references public.fleets(id) on delete set null,\n plate text unique not null,\n loyve_nr text,\n make text not null,\n model text not null,\n year int,\n color text,\n tier vehicle_tier not null default 'Standard',\n capacity int not null default 4,\n accessibility_flags jsonb not null default '{}'::jsonb,\n inspection_valid_until date,\n insurance_valid_until date,\n insurance_doc_url text,\n eu_kontroll_valid_until date,\n registration_doc_url text,\n active boolean not null default true,\n created_at timestamptz not null default now()\n);\n\ncreate index if not exists vehicles_fleet_idx on public.vehicles(fleet_id);\n\n-- Drivers (extends profile)\ncreate table if not exists public.drivers (\n profile_id uuid primary key references public.profiles(id) on delete cascade,\n kjoreseddel_id text unique,\n kjoreseddel_valid_until date,\n kjoreseddel_status text not null default 'pending',\n bankid_verified boolean not null default false,\n fleet_id uuid references public.fleets(id) on delete set null,\n default_vehicle_id uuid references public.vehicles(id),\n online_status online_status not null default 'offline',\n rating numeric(3,2) not null default 5.00,\n total_trips int not null default 0,\n joined_at timestamptz not null default now()\n);\n\ncreate index if not exists drivers_fleet_idx on public.drivers(fleet_id);\ncreate index if not exists drivers_online_idx on public.drivers(online_status) where online_status = 'online';\n\n-- Live locations (UPSERT every 1.4s)\ncreate table if not exists public.driver_locations (\n driver_id uuid primary key references public.drivers(profile_id) on delete cascade,\n lng double precision not null,\n lat double precision not null,\n heading_deg numeric,\n speed_kmh numeric,\n updated_at timestamptz not null default now()\n);\n\ncreate index if not exists driver_locations_updated_idx on public.driver_locations(updated_at);\n\n-- Driver sessions (shift tracking for working time + MVA)\ncreate table if not exists public.driver_sessions (\n id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),\n driver_id uuid not null references public.drivers(profile_id) on delete cascade,\n started_at timestamptz not null default now(),\n ended_at timestamptz,\n total_km numeric not null default 0,\n total_hours numeric not null default 0\n);\n\ncreate index if not exists driver_sessions_driver_idx on public.driver_sessions(driver_id);\n\n-- Driver documents (KYC)\ncreate table if not exists public.driver_documents (\n id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),\n driver_id uuid not null references public.drivers(profile_id) on delete cascade,\n doc_type text not null,\n file_url text not null,\n uploaded_at timestamptz not null default now(),\n verified_at timestamptz,\n expires_at date\n);\n\n-- Loyvehaver applications (pending fleet owner approvals)\ncreate table if not exists public.loyvehaver_applications (\n id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),\n orgnr text not null,\n orgnavn text not null,\n contact_name text not null,\n contact_phone text not null,\n contact_email text,\n payout_iban text,\n status text not null default 'pending',\n submitted_at timestamptz not null default now(),\n reviewed_at timestamptz,\n reviewed_by_profile_id uuid references public.profiles(id),\n reject_reason text,\n raw_documents jsonb not null default '[]'::jsonb,\n raw_vehicles jsonb not null default '[]'::jsonb\n);\n\ncreate index if not exists loyvehaver_applications_status_idx on public.loyvehaver_applications(status);\n\n-- RLS\nalter table public.fleets enable row level security;\nalter table public.vehicles enable row level security;\nalter table public.drivers enable row level security;\nalter table public.driver_locations enable row level security;\nalter table public.driver_sessions enable row level security;\nalter table public.driver_documents enable row level security;\nalter table public.loyvehaver_applications enable row level security;\n\n-- Fleets: owner sees own, super_admin sees all\ncreate policy \"fleet owner reads own\" on public.fleets for select\n using (owner_profile_id = auth.uid()\n or exists (select 1 from public.profiles where id = auth.uid() and role = 'super_admin'));\n\ncreate policy \"fleet owner updates own\" on public.fleets for update\n using (owner_profile_id = auth.uid());\n\n-- Vehicles: fleet owner sees own fleet's vehicles, drivers see assigned, super_admin all\ncreate policy \"vehicles readable by fleet/driver/admin\" on public.vehicles for select\n using (\n exists (select 1 from public.fleets f where f.id = vehicles.fleet_id and f.owner_profile_id = auth.uid())\n or exists (select 1 from public.drivers d where d.profile_id = auth.uid() and d.default_vehicle_id = vehicles.id)\n or exists (select 1 from public.profiles where id = auth.uid() and role = 'super_admin')\n );\n\n-- Drivers: self read/update; fleet owner reads own fleet drivers\ncreate policy \"driver self rw\" on public.drivers for all\n using (profile_id = auth.uid()) with check (profile_id = auth.uid());\n\ncreate policy \"fleet owner reads own drivers\" on public.drivers for select\n using (exists (select 1 from public.fleets f where f.id = drivers.fleet_id and f.owner_profile_id = auth.uid()));\n\n-- Driver locations: driver upserts own; everyone reads online drivers\ncreate policy \"driver upsert own location\" on public.driver_locations for all\n using (driver_id = auth.uid()) with check (driver_id = auth.uid());\n\ncreate policy \"everyone reads online driver locations\" on public.driver_locations for select\n using (exists (select 1 from public.drivers d where d.profile_id = driver_locations.driver_id and d.online_status = 'online'));\n\ncreate policy \"driver session self rw\" on public.driver_sessions for all\n using (driver_id = auth.uid()) with check (driver_id = auth.uid());\n\ncreate policy \"driver docs self rw\" on public.driver_documents for all\n using (driver_id = auth.uid()) with check (driver_id = auth.uid());\n\n-- Loyvehaver applications: anyone inserts, only super_admin reads\ncreate policy \"anyone submits application\" on public.loyvehaver_applications for insert with check (true);\ncreate policy \"super admin reads applications\" on public.loyvehaver_applications for select\n using (exists (select 1 from public.profiles where id = auth.uid() and role = 'super_admin'));\ncreate policy \"super admin updates applications\" on public.loyvehaver_applications for update\n using (exists (select 1 from public.profiles where id = auth.uid() and role = 'super_admin'));\n"}, {"path": "supabase/migrations/0003_rides_payments.sql", "content": "-- Rides, ride events, messages, ratings, payments, receipts\n-- Norwegian taxi: 12% MVA (persontransport), 10% KJAPP platform fee\n\ndo $$ begin\n create type ride_status as enum (\n 'requested', 'matched', 'accepted', 'driver_arrived',\n 'in_progress', 'completed', 'cancelled', 'rejected'\n );\nexception when duplicate_object then null; end $$;\n\ndo $$ begin\n create type payment_status as enum (\n 'pending', 'authorized', 'captured', 'refunded', 'failed'\n );\nexception when duplicate_object then null; end $$;\n\ndo $$ begin\n create type payment_provider as enum ('stripe', 'vipps', 'apple_pay', 'google_pay', 'card', 'invoice');\nexception when duplicate_object then null; end $$;\n\n-- Payment methods (per customer)\ncreate table if not exists public.payment_methods (\n id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),\n profile_id uuid not null references public.profiles(id) on delete cascade,\n provider payment_provider not null,\n external_token text,\n stripe_payment_method_id text,\n last4 text,\n vipps_msisdn text,\n is_default boolean not null default false,\n created_at timestamptz not null default now(),\n deleted_at timestamptz\n);\n\ncreate index if not exists payment_methods_profile_idx on public.payment_methods(profile_id) where deleted_at is null;\n\n-- Rides\ncreate table if not exists public.rides (\n id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),\n customer_id uuid not null references public.profiles(id) on delete restrict,\n driver_id uuid references public.profiles(id) on delete set null,\n vehicle_id uuid references public.vehicles(id) on delete set null,\n tier vehicle_tier not null default 'Standard',\n status ride_status not null default 'requested',\n\n pickup_lng double precision not null,\n pickup_lat double precision not null,\n pickup_address text not null,\n destination_lng double precision not null,\n destination_lat double precision not null,\n destination_address text not null,\n\n estimated_fare_nok numeric(10,2),\n final_fare_nok numeric(10,2),\n distance_km numeric(8,2),\n duration_min numeric(6,2),\n surge_multiplier numeric(4,2) not null default 1.00,\n\n -- Norway tax + platform fee\n mva_percent numeric(4,2) not null default 12.00,\n mva_amount_nok numeric(10,2),\n platform_fee_percent numeric(4,2) not null default 10.00,\n platform_fee_nok numeric(10,2),\n driver_payout_nok numeric(10,2),\n\n requested_at timestamptz not null default now(),\n matched_at timestamptz,\n accepted_at timestamptz,\n driver_arrived_at timestamptz,\n picked_up_at timestamptz,\n completed_at timestamptz,\n cancelled_at timestamptz,\n cancel_reason text\n);\n\ncreate index if not exists rides_customer_idx on public.rides(customer_id);\ncreate index if not exists rides_driver_idx on public.rides(driver_id) where driver_id is not null;\ncreate index if not exists rides_status_idx on public.rides(status);\n\n-- Ride events (append-only audit log)\ncreate table if not exists public.ride_events (\n id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),\n ride_id uuid not null references public.rides(id) on delete cascade,\n event_type text not null,\n actor_profile_id uuid references public.profiles(id),\n payload jsonb not null default '{}'::jsonb,\n at timestamptz not null default now()\n);\n\ncreate index if not exists ride_events_ride_idx on public.ride_events(ride_id);\n\n-- Ride messages (chat)\ncreate table if not exists public.ride_messages (\n id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),\n ride_id uuid not null references public.rides(id) on delete cascade,\n sender_profile_id uuid not null references public.profiles(id) on delete cascade,\n body text not null,\n created_at timestamptz not null default now(),\n read_at timestamptz\n);\n\ncreate index if not exists ride_messages_ride_idx on public.ride_messages(ride_id);\n\n-- Ride ratings (two-way)\ncreate table if not exists public.ride_ratings (\n id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),\n ride_id uuid not null references public.rides(id) on delete cascade,\n rater_profile_id uuid not null references public.profiles(id) on delete cascade,\n ratee_profile_id uuid not null references public.profiles(id) on delete cascade,\n stars int not null check (stars between 1 and 5),\n comment text,\n created_at timestamptz not null default now(),\n unique (ride_id, rater_profile_id)\n);\n\n-- Payments\ncreate table if not exists public.payments (\n id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),\n ride_id uuid not null unique references public.rides(id) on delete restrict,\n profile_id uuid not null references public.profiles(id),\n payment_method_id uuid references public.payment_methods(id),\n provider payment_provider not null,\n provider_reference text,\n stripe_payment_intent_id text,\n stripe_charge_id text,\n amount_nok numeric(10,2) not null,\n platform_fee_nok numeric(10,2) not null default 0,\n driver_payout_nok numeric(10,2) not null default 0,\n mva_amount_nok numeric(10,2) not null default 0,\n currency text not null default 'NOK',\n status payment_status not null default 'pending',\n captured_at timestamptz,\n refunded_at timestamptz,\n raw_response jsonb,\n created_at timestamptz not null default now()\n);\n\ncreate index if not exists payments_profile_idx on public.payments(profile_id);\ncreate index if not exists payments_status_idx on public.payments(status);\n\n-- Receipts\ncreate table if not exists public.receipts (\n
