id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),\n ride_id uuid not null unique references public.rides(id) on delete cascade,\n payment_id uuid not null references public.payments(id) on delete cascade,\n pdf_url text,\n html_body text,\n mva_breakdown jsonb not null default '{}'::jsonb,\n issued_at timestamptz not null default now(),\n emailed_to text\n);\n\n-- Pricing rules\ncreate table if not exists public.pricing_rules (\n id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),\n tier vehicle_tier not null,\n base_fare_nok numeric(8,2) not null,\n per_km_nok numeric(6,2) not null,\n per_min_nok numeric(6,2) not null,\n night_multiplier numeric(4,2) not null default 1.00,\n weekend_multiplier numeric(4,2) not null default 1.00,\n valid_from timestamptz not null default now(),\n valid_until timestamptz\n);\n\n-- Seed pricing (NOK, indicative)\ninsert into public.pricing_rules (tier, base_fare_nok, per_km_nok, per_min_nok, night_multiplier, weekend_multiplier)\nvalues\n ('Eco', 55.00, 14.00, 4.00, 1.10, 1.15),\n ('Standard', 69.00, 17.00, 5.00, 1.15, 1.20),\n ('Premium', 109.00, 25.00, 7.00, 1.20, 1.25),\n ('XL', 129.00, 28.00, 8.00, 1.20, 1.25)\non conflict do nothing;\n\n-- Audit log (admin actions)\ncreate table if not exists public.audit_log (\n id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),\n actor_profile_id uuid references public.profiles(id),\n action text not null,\n target_table text not null,\n target_id uuid,\n before jsonb,\n after jsonb,\n at timestamptz not null default now()\n);\n\n-- Feedback\ncreate table if not exists public.feedback (\n id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),\n profile_id uuid references public.profiles(id) on delete set null,\n ride_id uuid references public.rides(id) on delete set null,\n category text,\n body text not null,\n screenshot_url text,\n created_at timestamptz not null default now(),\n resolved_at timestamptz\n);\n\n-- RLS\nalter table public.payment_methods enable row level security;\nalter table public.rides enable row level security;\nalter table public.ride_events enable row level security;\nalter table public.ride_messages enable row level security;\nalter table public.ride_ratings enable row level security;\nalter table public.payments enable row level security;\nalter table public.receipts enable row level security;\nalter table public.pricing_rules enable row level security;\nalter table public.audit_log enable row level security;\nalter table public.feedback enable row level security;\n\n-- Payment methods: own only\ncreate policy \"own payment methods rw\" on public.payment_methods for all\n using (profile_id = auth.uid()) with check (profile_id = auth.uid());\n\n-- Rides: customer creates + reads own; driver reads/updates assigned\ncreate policy \"customer creates own ride\" on public.rides for insert\n with check (customer_id = auth.uid());\ncreate policy \"customer reads own rides\" on public.rides for select\n using (customer_id = auth.uid() or driver_id = auth.uid());\ncreate policy \"driver updates assigned ride\" on public.rides for update\n using (driver_id = auth.uid());\ncreate policy \"customer updates own pending ride\" on public.rides for update\n using (customer_id = auth.uid() and status in ('requested', 'matched'));\n\n-- Ride events: insertable by participants; readable by participants\ncreate policy \"ride event readable by participants\" on public.ride_events for select\n using (exists (\n select 1 from public.rides r where r.id = ride_events.ride_id\n and (r.customer_id = auth.uid() or r.driver_id = auth.uid())\n ));\ncreate policy \"ride event insertable by participants\" on public.ride_events for insert\n with check (exists (\n select 1 from public.rides r where r.id = ride_events.ride_id\n and (r.customer_id = auth.uid() or r.driver_id = auth.uid())\n ));\n\n-- Ride messages: participants only\ncreate policy \"ride messages readable\" on public.ride_messages for select\n using (exists (\n select 1 from public.rides r where r.id = ride_messages.ride_id\n and (r.customer_id = auth.uid() or r.driver_id = auth.uid())\n ));\ncreate policy \"ride messages insertable\" on public.ride_messages for insert\n with check (sender_profile_id = auth.uid() and exists (\n select 1 from public.rides r where r.id = ride_messages.ride_id\n and (r.customer_id = auth.uid() or r.driver_id = auth.uid())\n ));\n\n-- Ratings: rater only inserts; participants read\ncreate policy \"rating insertable by rater\" on public.ride_ratings for insert\n with check (rater_profile_id = auth.uid());\ncreate policy \"rating readable by participants\" on public.ride_ratings for select\n using (rater_profile_id = auth.uid() or ratee_profile_id = auth.uid());\n\n-- Payments: customer reads own via ride; driver reads payout amounts only\ncreate policy \"customer reads own payments\" on public.payments for select\n using (profile_id = auth.uid()\n or exists (select 1 from public.rides r where r.id = payments.ride_id and r.driver_id = auth.uid()));\n\n-- Receipts: ride participants\ncreate policy \"receipt readable by ride participants\" on public.receipts for select\n using (exists (\n select 1 from public.rides r where r.id = receipts.ride_id\n and (r.customer_id = auth.uid() or r.driver_id = auth.uid())\n ));\n\n-- Pricing rules: public read\ncreate policy \"pricing rules public\" on public.pricing_rules for select using (true);\n\n-- Audit log: super_admin only\ncreate policy \"audit log super admin\" on public.audit_log for select\n using (exists (select 1 from public.profiles where id = auth.uid() and role = 'super_admin'));\n\n-- Feedback: self insert; super_admin reads all; self reads own\ncreate policy \"feedback self insert\" on public.feedback for insert\n with check (profile_id = auth.uid() or profile_id is null);\ncreate policy \"feedback own read\" on public.feedback for select\n using (profile_id = auth.uid()\n or exists (select 1 from public.profiles where id = auth.uid() and role = 'super_admin'));\n"}, {"path": "utils/supabase/info.tsx", "content": "/* AUTOGENERATED FILE - DO NOT EDIT CONTENTS */\n\nexport const projectId = \"fjaohfebbidrsitqitbm\"\nexport const publicAnonKey = \"eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImZqYW9oZmViYmlkcnNpdHFpdGJtIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3ODA3ODIwMjIsImV4cCI6MjA5NjM1ODAyMn0.-uEeIhpr_cxsPogIBdqih4z5-6S2PLFVJNoIKx-z8NU\""}, {"path": "package.json", "content": "{\n \"name\": \"@figma/my-make-file\",\n \"private\": true,\n \"version\": \"0.0.1\",\n \"type\": \"module\",\n \"scripts\": {\n \"build\": \"vite build\"\n },\n \"dependencies\": {\n \"@popperjs/core\": \"2.11.8\",\n \"@radix-ui/react-accordion\": \"1.2.3\",\n \"@radix-ui/react-alert-dialog\": \"1.1.6\",\n \"@radix-ui/react-aspect-ratio\": \"1.1.2\",\n \"@radix-ui/react-avatar\": \"1.1.3\",\n \"@radix-ui/react-checkbox\": \"1.1.4\",\n \"@radix-ui/react-collapsible\": \"1.1.3\",\n \"@radix-ui/react-context-menu\": \"2.2.6\",\n \"@radix-ui/react-dialog\": \"1.1.6\",\n \"@radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu\": \"2.1.6\",\n \"@radix-ui/react-hover-card\": \"1.1.6\",\n \"@radix-ui/react-label\": \"2.1.2\",\n \"@radix-ui/react-menubar\": \"1.1.6\",\n \"@radix-ui/react-navigation-menu\": \"1.2.5\",\n \"@radix-ui/react-popover\": \"1.1.6\",\n \"@radix-ui/react-progress\": \"1.1.2\",\n \"@radix-ui/react-radio-group\": \"1.2.3\",\n \"@radix-ui/react-scroll-area\": \"1.2.3\",\n \"@radix-ui/react-select\": \"2.1.6\",\n \"@radix-ui/react-separator\": \"1.1.2\",\n \"@radix-ui/react-slider\": \"1.2.3\",\n \"@radix-ui/react-slot\": \"1.1.2\",\n \"@radix-ui/react-switch\": \"1.1.3\",\n \"@radix-ui/react-tabs\": \"1.1.3\",\n \"@radix-ui/react-toggle\": \"1.1.2\",\n \"@radix-ui/react-toggle-group\": \"1.1.2\",\n \"@radix-ui/react-tooltip\": \"1.1.8\",\n \"@stripe/stripe-js\": \"^9.7.0\",\n \"@supabase/supabase-js\": \"^2.107.0\",\n \"canvas-confetti\": \"1.9.4\",\n \"class-variance-authority\": \"0.7.1\",\n \"clsx\": \"2.1.1\",\n \"cmdk\": \"1.1.1\",\n \"date-fns\": \"3.6.0\",\n \"embla-carousel-react\": \"8.6.0\",\n \"input-otp\": \"1.4.2\",\n \"lucide-react\": \"0.487.0\",\n \"maplibre-gl\": \"5.4.0\",\n \"motion\": \"12.23.24\",\n \"next-themes\": \"0.4.6\",\n \"react-day-picker\": \"8.10.1\",\n \"react-dnd\": \"16.0.1\",\n \"react-dnd-html5-backend\": \"16.0.1\",\n \"react-hook-form\": \"7.55.0\",\n \"react-popper\": \"2.3.0\",\n \"react-resizable-panels\": \"2.1.7\",\n \"react-responsive-masonry\": \"2.7.1\",\n \"react-router\": \"7.13.0\",\n \"react-slick\": \"0.31.0\",\n \"recharts\": \"2.15.2\",\n \"sonner\": \"2.0.3\",\n \"tailwind-merge\": \"3.2.0\",\n \"tw-animate-css\": \"1.3.8\",\n \"vaul\": \"1.1.2\"\n },\n \"devDependencies\": {\n \"@tailwindcss/vite\": \"4.1.12\",\n \"@vitejs/plugin-react\": \"4.7.0\",\n \"tailwindcss\": \"4.1.12\",\n \"vite\": \"6.3.5\"\n },\n \"peerDependencies\": {\n \"react\": \"18.3.1\",\n \"react-dom\": \"18.3.1\"\n },\n \"peerDependenciesMeta\": {\n \"react\": {\n \"optional\": true\n },\n \"react-dom\": {\n \"optional\": true\n }\n },\n \"pnpm\": {\n \"overrides\": {\n \"vite\": \"6.3.5\"\n }\n }\n}\n"}, {"path": "vite.config.ts", "content": "import { defineConfig } from 'vite'\nimport path from 'path'\nimport tailwindcss from '@tailwindcss/vite'\nimport react from '@vitejs/plugin-react'\n\nexport default defineConfig({\n plugins: [\n // The React and Tailwind plugins are both required for Make, even if\n // Tailwind is not being actively used – do not remove them\n react(),\n tailwindcss(),\n ],\n resolve: {\n alias: {\n // Alias @ to the src directory\n '@': path.resolve(__dirname, './src'),\n },\n },\n\n // File types to support raw imports. Never add .css, .tsx, or .ts files to this.\n assetsInclude: ['**/*.svg', '**/*.csv'],\n})\n"}, {"path": "app.json", "content": "{\n \"expo\": {\n \"name\": \"KJAPP\",\n \"slug\": \"kjapp-taxi\",\n \"version\": \"1.0.0\",\n \"orientation\": \"portrait\",\n \"icon\": \"./src/imports/image.png\",\n \"userInterfaceStyle\": \"dark\",\n \"splash\": {\n \"image\": \"./src/imports/image.png\",\n \"resizeMode\": \"contain\",\n \"backgroundColor\": \"#0a0a1a\"\n },\n \"ios\": {\n \"supportsTablet\": false,\n \"bundleIdentifier\": \"no.kjapp.app\",\n \"buildNumber\": \"1\"\n },\n \"android\": {\n \"adaptiveIcon\": {\n \"foregroundImage\": \"./src/imports/image.png\",\n \"backgroundColor\": \"#0a0a1a\"\n },\n \"package\": \"no.kjapp.app\",\n \"versionCode\": 1,\n \"permissions\": [\n \"ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION\",\n \"ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION\",\n \"CAMERA\",\n \"RECORD_AUDIO\",\n \"VIBRATE\"\n ]\n },\n \"web\": {\n \"favicon\": \"./src/imports/image.png\"\n },\n \"plugins\": [\n [\n \"expo-location\",\n {\n \"locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission\": \"KJAPP trenger din posisjon for å finne nærmeste sjåfør.\"\n }\n ]\n ],\n \"extra\": {\n \"eas\": {\n \"projectId\": \"kjapp-taxi-app\"\n }\n }\n }\n}\n"}, {"path": "eas.json", "content": "{\n \"cli\": {\n \"version\": \">= 10.0.0\"\n },\n \"build\": {\n \"development\": {\n \"developmentClient\": true,\n \"distribution\": \"internal\",\n \"android\": {\n \"buildType\": \"apk\"\n }\n },\n \"preview\": {\n \"distribution\": \"internal\",\n \"android\": {\n \"buildType\": \"apk\"\n },\n \"ios\": {\n \"simulator\": false\n }\n },\n \"production\": {\n \"android\": {\n \"buildType\": \"app-bundle\"\n }\n }\n },\n \"submit\": {\n \"production\": {\n \"android\": {\n \"serviceAccountKeyPath\": \"./google-service-account.json\",\n \"track\": \"internal\"\n }\n }\n }\n}\n"}, {"path": ".gitignore", "content": "# Dependencies\nnode_modules/\n.pnpm-store/\n\n# Build output\ndist/\nbuild/\n.vite/\n\n# Environment & secrets\n.env\n.env.local\n.env.*.local\n*.env\n\n# Supabase local\nsupabase/.branches/\nsupabase/.temp/\n\n# OS\n.DS_Store\nThumbs.db\n\n# Editor\n.vscode/\n.idea/\n*.swp\n\n# Logs\n*.log\nnpm-debug.log*\n\n# Figma Make internals\n__figma__entrypoint__.ts\n"}, {"path": "pnpm-workspace.yaml", "content": "packages:\n - '.'"}, {"path": "postcss.config.mjs", "content": "/**\n * PostCSS Configuration\n *\n * Tailwind CSS v4 (via @tailwindcss/vite) automatically sets up all required\n * PostCSS plugins — you do NOT need to include `tailwindcss` or `autoprefixer` here.\n *\n * This file only exists for adding additional PostCSS plugins, if needed.\n * For example:\n *\n * import postcssNested from 'postcss-nested'\n * export default { plugins: [postcssNested()] }\n *\n * Otherwise, you can leave this file empty.\n */\nexport default {}\n"}]; let currentFilter = 'all'; let currentSearch = ''; let activeFile = null; function getCat(path) { if (path.includes('/screens/')) return 'screens'; if (path.startsWith('supabase/')) return 'supabase'; if (path.includes('/components/') || path.includes('/lib/') || path.includes('/data/')) return 'components'; return 'config'; } function getExt(path) { const ext = path.split('.').pop(); return ext; } function getColor(ext) { const map = { tsx: 'ext-tsx', ts: 'ext-ts', sql: 'ext-sql', css: 'ext-css', json: 'ext-json' }; return map[ext] || 'ext-other'; } function filteredFiles() { return FILES.filter(f => { const matchCat = currentFilter === 'all' || getCat(f.path) === currentFilter; const matchSearch = !currentSearch || f.path.toLowerCase().includes(currentSearch.toLowerCase()) || f.content.toLowerCase().includes(currentSearch.toLowerCase()); return matchCat && matchSearch; }); } function renderSidebar() { const files = filteredFiles(); document.getElementById('fileCount').textContent = FILES.length; const cats = {}; files.forEach(f => { const cat = getCat(f.path); if (!cats[cat]) cats[cat] = []; cats[cat].push(f); }); const catLabels = { screens: 'Skjermer', components: 'Komponenter', supabase: 'Supabase / Database', config: 'Konfig' }; const catOrder = ['screens', 'components', 'supabase', 'config']; let html = ''; catOrder.forEach(cat => { if (!cats[cat]) return; html += `
    ${catLabels[cat] || cat} (${cats[cat].length})
    `; cats[cat].forEach(f => { const name = f.path.split('/').pop(); const dir = f.path.split('/').slice(0,-1).join('/'); const ext = getExt(f.path); const isActive = activeFile === f.path ? 'active' : ''; html += `
    ${name} ${ext.toUpperCase()}
    `; }); }); document.getElementById('sidebar').innerHTML = html; } function openFile(path) { activeFile = path; const file = FILES.find(f => f.path === path); if (!file) return; renderSidebar(); const ext = getExt(path); document.getElementById('viewer').innerHTML = `
    ${path} 
    ${escapeHtml(file.content)}
    `; } function escapeHtml(s) { return s.replace(/&/g,'&').replace(//g,'>').replace(/"/g,'"'); } function copyFile(path) { const file = FILES.find(f => f.path === path); if (file) { navigator.clipboard.writeText(file.content); showToast('Kopiert!'); } } function downloadFile(path) { const file = FILES.find(f => f.path === path); if (!file) return; const a = document.createElement('a'); a.href = 'data:text/plain;charset=utf-8,' + encodeURIComponent(file.content); a.download = path.split('/').pop(); a.click(); } function copyAllFiles() { const names = FILES.map(f => f.path).join('\n'); navigator.clipboard.writeText(names); showToast('Alle filnavn kopiert!'); } function searchFiles(q) { currentSearch = q; renderSidebar(); } function filterCat(cat) { currentFilter = cat; renderSidebar(); } async function downloadZip() { showToast('Bygger ZIP...'); const zip = new JSZip(); FILES.forEach(f => zip.file(f.path, f.content)); const blob = await zip.generateAsync({ type: 'blob', compression: 'DEFLATE', compressionOptions: { level: 6 } }); const a = document.createElement('a'); a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob); a.download = 'KJAPP-prosjekt.zip'; a.click(); showToast('ZIP lastet ned!'); } function showToast(msg) { const t = document.getElementById('toast'); t.textContent = msg; t.classList.add('show'); setTimeout(() => t.classList.remove('show'), 2500); } renderSidebar();
